<!--
  This Behavior Tree initialize navigation at the moment, but will navigate and find an object
-->
<root main_tree_to_execute="MainTree">
  <BehaviorTree ID="MainTree">
      <Sequence name="root_sequence">
          <InitializeNavigation timeout_s="{timeout_s}"/>
          <!-- Set this value at task_monitor! -->
          <RecoveryNode number_of_retries="100" name="FindElementRecovery">
              <ElementFound/>
              <Sequence name="navigate_and_spin_sequence">
                  <GetNextPose goal_poses="{goal_poses}" new_position_goal="{goal_position}" new_orientation_goal="{goal_orientation}"/>
                  <NavigateToPose position="{goal_position}" orientation="{goal_orientation}"/>
                  <Repeat num_cycles="{spin_cycles}">
                      <Sequence name="spin_and_wait">
                          <Spin spin_dist="{spin_angle}"/>
                          <Wait wait_duration="{wait_time}"/>
                      </Sequence>
                  </Repeat>
              </Sequence> 
            <!-- Insert next sequence once the element is found -->
          </RecoveryNode>
      </Sequence>
  </BehaviorTree>
</root>

<!--
  This Behavior Tree follows a dynamic pose to a certain distance
-->

<root main_tree_to_execute="MainTree">
  <BehaviorTree ID="MainTree">
    <PipelineSequence name="NavigateWithReplanning">
      <RateController hz="1.0">
        <Sequence>
          <GoalUpdater input_goal="{goal}" output_goal="{updated_goal}">
            <ComputePathToPose goal="{updated_goal}" path="{path}" planner_id="GridBased"/>
          </GoalUpdater>
         <TruncatePath distance="1.0" input_path="{path}" output_path="{truncated_path}"/>
        </Sequence>
      </RateController>
      <KeepRunningUntilFailure>
        <FollowPath path="{truncated_path}" controller_id="FollowPath"/>
      </KeepRunningUntilFailure>
    </PipelineSequence>
  </BehaviorTree>
</root>

<root main_tree_to_execute = "MainTree" >
    <BehaviorTree ID="MainTree">
        <Sequence name="root_sequence">
            <!-- Compute the route to desired goal pose. This will be the high-level mission planner which doesn't 
            consider any vehicle constraints or collison information. Later change "trajectory" to "route" -->
            <ComputeRoute goal_pose="{goal_pose}" route="{route}" server_name="/route_planner/plan_route"/>
            <!-- <ComputePlan route="{route}" path="{path}" server_name="/path_planner/plan_path"/> -->
            <ReactiveSequence>
                <RateController hz="10.0">
                    <ComputeTrajectory route="{route}" trajectory="{trajectory}" server_name="/trajectory_planner/plan_trajectory"/>
                </RateController>
                <FollowTrajectory trajectory="{trajectory}" server_name="/path_tracking_controller/follow_trajectory"/>
            </ReactiveSequence>
        </Sequence>
    </BehaviorTree>
</root>

<!--
  This Behavior Tree replans the global path periodically at 1 Hz and it also has
  recovery actions.
-->
<root main_tree_to_execute="MainTree">
  <BehaviorTree ID="MainTree">
    <RecoveryNode number_of_retries="6" name="NavigateRecovery">
      <PipelineSequence name="NavigateWithReplanning">
        <RateController hz="1.0">
          <RecoveryNode number_of_retries="1" name="ComputePathToPose">
            <ComputePathToPose goal="{goal}" path="{path}" planner_id="GridBased"/>
            <ClearEntireCostmap name="ClearGlobalCostmap-Context" service_name="global_costmap/clear_entirely_global_costmap"/>
          </RecoveryNode>
        </RateController>
        <RecoveryNode number_of_retries="1" name="FollowPath">
          <FollowPath path="{path}" controller_id="FollowPath"/>
          <ClearEntireCostmap name="ClearLocalCostmap-Context" service_name="local_costmap/clear_entirely_local_costmap"/>
        </RecoveryNode>
      </PipelineSequence>
      <ReactiveFallback name="RecoveryFallback">
        <GoalUpdated/>
        <SequenceStar name="RecoveryActions">
          <ClearEntireCostmap name="ClearLocalCostmap-Subtree" service_name="local_costmap/clear_entirely_local_costmap"/>
          <ClearEntireCostmap name="ClearGlobalCostmap-Subtree" service_name="global_costmap/clear_entirely_global_costmap"/>
          <Spin spin_dist="1.57"/>
          <Wait wait_duration="5"/>
        </SequenceStar>
      </ReactiveFallback>
    </RecoveryNode>
  </BehaviorTree>
</root>

<!--
  This Behavior Tree replans the global path periodically at 1 Hz and it also has
  recovery actions.
-->
<root main_tree_to_execute="MainTree">
  <BehaviorTree ID="MainTree">
    <RecoveryNode number_of_retries="2" name="NavigateRecovery">
      <PipelineSequence name="NavigateWithReplanning">
        <RateController hz="1.0">
          <RecoveryNode number_of_retries="4" name="ComputePathToPose">
            <ComputePathToPose goal="{goal}" path="{path}" planner_id="GridBased"/>
            <ReactiveFallback name="PathToPoseFallback">
              <GoalUpdated/>
              <RoundRobin name="GlobalPlannerRecoveryActions">
                <ClearEntireCostmap name="ClearGlobalCostmap-Context" service_name="global_costmap/clear_entirely_global_costmap"/>
                <Wait wait_duration="2"/>
              </RoundRobin>
            </ReactiveFallback>
          </RecoveryNode>
        </RateController>
        <RecoveryNode number_of_retries="4" name="FollowPath">
          <FollowPath path="{path}" controller_id="FollowPath"/>
          <ReactiveFallback name="FollowPathFallback">
            <GoalUpdated/>
            <RoundRobin name="PlannerRecoveryActions">
              <ClearEntireCostmap name="ClearLocalCostmap-Context" service_name="local_costmap/clear_entirely_local_costmap"/>
              <Spin spin_dist="1.57"/>
            </RoundRobin>
          </ReactiveFallback>
        </RecoveryNode>
      </PipelineSequence>
      <ReactiveFallback name="RecoveryFallback">
        <GoalUpdated/>
        <Wait wait_duration="5"/>
      </ReactiveFallback>
    </RecoveryNode>
  </BehaviorTree>
</root>

<root main_tree_to_execute="MainTree">
    <!--  ===================================  -->
    <BehaviorTree ID="Combat">
        <SequenceStar>
            <Condition ID="IsInCombat"/>
            <Action ID="AbortJob"/>
            <ForceSuccess>
                <SequenceStar>
                    <Action ID="GetTarget"/>
                    <Action ID="Move"/>
                    <Sequence>
                        <Condition ID="TargetAdjacent"/>
                        <Action ID="AttackTarget"/>
                    </Sequence>
                </SequenceStar>
            </ForceSuccess>
            <Condition ID="IsInCombat"/>
        </SequenceStar>
    </BehaviorTree>
    <!--  ===================================  -->
    <BehaviorTree ID="GetUniform">
        <SequenceStar name="GetUniform">
            <Action ID="CheckUniform"/>
            <Fallback>
                <Action ID="Move"/>
                <Action ID="UniformCleanUp"/>
            </Fallback>
            <Action ID="EquipUniform"/>
        </SequenceStar>
    </BehaviorTree>
    <!--  ===================================  -->
    <BehaviorTree ID="Hunger">
        <SequenceStar>
            <Condition ID="IsHungry"/>
            <Sequence>
                <SequenceStar name="Hunger">
                    <Action ID="FindFood"/>
                    <Action ID="Move"/>
                    <Action ID="PickUpItem"/>
                    <ForceSuccess>
                        <SequenceStar>
                            <Action ID="FindDining"/>
                            <Action ID="Move"/>
                        </SequenceStar>
                    </ForceSuccess>
                    <Action ID="Eat"/>
                </SequenceStar>
                <Condition ID="IsFull"/>
            </Sequence>
        </SequenceStar>
    </BehaviorTree>
    <!--  ===================================  -->
    <BehaviorTree ID="JobButcherAnimal">
        <BB_Precondition expected="ButcherAnimal" key="JobType">
            <Fallback>
                <SequenceStar>
                    <Action ID="InitAnimalJob"/>
                    <Action ID="Move"/>
                    <Action ID="GrabAnimal"/>
                    <Action ID="GetItemDropPosition"/>
                    <Action ID="Move"/>
                    <Action ID="FinalMoveAnimal"/>
                    <Action ID="ButcherAnimal"/>
                    <Action ID="FinishJob"/>
                </SequenceStar>
                <Action ID="AbortJob"/>
            </Fallback>
        </BB_Precondition>
    </BehaviorTree>
    <!--  ===================================  -->
    <BehaviorTree ID="JobDyeAnimal">
        <BB_Precondition expected="DyeAnimal" key="JobType">
            <Fallback>
                <SequenceStar>
                    <Action ID="InitJob"/>
                    <Action ID="ClaimItems"/>
                    <SubTree ID="MoveAllItemsToJob"/>
                    <Action ID="InitAnimalJob"/>
                    <Action ID="Move"/>
                    <Action ID="GrabAnimal"/>
                    <Action ID="GetItemDropPosition"/>
                    <Action ID="Move"/>
                    <Action ID="FinalMoveAnimal"/>
                    <Action ID="DyeAnimal"/>
                    <Action ID="FinishJob"/>
                </SequenceStar>
                <Action ID="AbortJob"/>
            </Fallback>
        </BB_Precondition>
    </BehaviorTree>
    <!--  ===================================  -->
    <BehaviorTree ID="JobHarvestAnimal">
        <BB_Precondition expected="HarvestAnimal" key="JobType">
            <Fallback>
                <SequenceStar>
                    <Action ID="InitAnimalJob"/>
                    <Action ID="Move"/>
                    <Action ID="GrabAnimal"/>
                    <Action ID="HarvestAnimal"/>
                    <Action ID="ReleaseAnimal"/>
                    <Action ID="FinishJob"/>
                </SequenceStar>
                <Action ID="AbortJob"/>
            </Fallback>
        </BB_Precondition>
    </BehaviorTree>
    <!--  ===================================  -->
    <BehaviorTree ID="JobHaulMultiple">
        <BB_Precondition expected="HauleMultipleItems" key="JobType">
            <Fallback>
                <SequenceStar>
                    <Action ID="InitJob"/>
                    <Action ID="FindTool"/>
                    <Action ID="Move"/>
                    <Action ID="EquipTool"/>
                    <Inverter>
                        <Sequence>
                            <Inverter>
                                <Condition ID="AllPickedUp"/>
                            </Inverter>
                            <Sequence>
                                <Action ID="Move"/>
                                <Action ID="PickUpItem"/>
                            </Sequence>
                            <Action ID="ReturnAlwaysRunning"/>
                        </Sequence>
                    </Inverter>
                    <Condition ID="AllPickedUp"/>
                    <Action ID="GetItemDropPosition"/>
                    <Action ID="Move"/>
                    <Action ID="DropAllItems"/>
                    <Action ID="FinishJob"/>
                </SequenceStar>
                <Action ID="AbortJob"/>
            </Fallback>
        </BB_Precondition>
    </BehaviorTree>
    <!--  ===================================  -->
    <BehaviorTree ID="JobLeadAnimalToPasture">
        <BB_Precondition expected="LeadAnimalToPasture" key="JobType">
            <Fallback>
                <SequenceStar>
                    <Action ID="InitAnimalJob"/>
                    <Action ID="Move"/>
                    <Action ID="GrabAnimal"/>
                    <Action ID="GetItemDropPosition"/>
                    <Action ID="Move"/>
                    <Action ID="FinalMoveAnimal"/>
                    <Action ID="ReleaseAnimal"/>
                    <Action ID="FinishJob"/>
                </SequenceStar>
                <Action ID="AbortJob"/>
            </Fallback>
        </BB_Precondition>
    </BehaviorTree>
    <!--  ===================================  -->
    <BehaviorTree ID="JobStandard">
        <Fallback>
            <SequenceStar name="StandardJobs">
                <Action ID="InitJob"/>
                <Action ID="ClaimItems"/>
                <Action ID="FindTool"/>
                <Action ID="Move"/>
                <Action ID="EquipTool"/>
                <SubTree ID="MoveAllItemsToJob"/>
                <Action ID="GetWorkPosition"/>
                <Action ID="Move"/>
                <Action ID="Work"/>
                <Action ID="FinishJob"/>
            </SequenceStar>
            <Action ID="AbortJob"/>
        </Fallback>
    </BehaviorTree>
    <!--  ===================================  -->
    <BehaviorTree ID="JobTameAnimal">
        <BB_Precondition expected="TameAnimal" key="JobType">
            <Fallback>
                <SequenceStar>
                    <Action ID="InitAnimalJob"/>
                    <Action ID="Move"/>
                    <Action ID="TameAnimal"/>
                    <Action ID="GrabAnimal"/>
                    <Action ID="GetItemDropPosition"/>
                    <Action ID="Move"/>
                    <Action ID="FinalMoveAnimal"/>
                    <Action ID="ReleaseAnimal"/>
                    <Action ID="FinishJob"/>
                </SequenceStar>
                <Action ID="AbortJob"/>
            </Fallback>
        </BB_Precondition>
    </BehaviorTree>
    <!--  ===================================  -->
    <BehaviorTree ID="Jobs">
        <SequenceStar>
            <Action ID="GetJob"/>
            <FallbackStar>
                <SubTree ID="JobButcherAnimal"/>
                <SubTree ID="JobDyeAnimal"/>
                <SubTree ID="JobLeadAnimalToPasture"/>
                <SubTree ID="JobHarvestAnimal"/>
                <SubTree ID="JobTameAnimal"/>
                <SubTree ID="JobHaulMultiple"/>
                <SubTree ID="JobStandard"/>
            </FallbackStar>
        </SequenceStar>
    </BehaviorTree>
    <!--  ===================================  -->
    <BehaviorTree ID="MainTree">
        <SubTree ID="Jobs"/>
    </BehaviorTree>
    <!--  ===================================  -->
    <BehaviorTree ID="MoveAllItemsToJob">
        <Sequence>
            <Inverter>
                <Sequence>
                    <Inverter>
                        <Condition ID="AllItemsInPlaceForJob"/>
                    </Inverter>
                    <SequenceStar>
                        <Action ID="Move"/>
                        <Action ID="PickUpItem"/>
                        <Action ID="GetItemDropPosition"/>
                        <Action ID="Move"/>
                        <Action ID="DropItem"/>
                    </SequenceStar>
                    <Action ID="ReturnAlwaysRunning"/>
                </Sequence>
            </Inverter>
            <Condition ID="AllItemsInPlaceForJob"/>
        </Sequence>
    </BehaviorTree>
    <!--  ===================================  -->
    <BehaviorTree ID="OldMoveAllItemsToJob">
        <FallbackStar>
            <Condition ID="AllItemsInPlaceForJob"/>
            <RetryUntilSuccesful num_attempts="20">
                <Sequence>
                    <SequenceStar>
                        <Action ID="Move"/>
                        <Action ID="PickUpItem"/>
                        <Fallback>
                            <Action ID="GetItemDropPosition"/>
                            <Action ID="DropItem"/>
                        </Fallback>
                        <Fallback>
                            <Action ID="Move"/>
                            <Action ID="DropItem"/>
                        </Fallback>
                        <Action ID="DropItem"/>
                    </SequenceStar>
                    <Condition ID="AllItemsInPlaceForJob"/>
                </Sequence>
            </RetryUntilSuccesful>
            <ForceFailure>
                <Action ID="AbortJob"/>
            </ForceFailure>
        </FallbackStar>
    </BehaviorTree>
    <!--  ===================================  -->
    <BehaviorTree ID="Sleepy">
        <SequenceStar name="Sleep">
            <Condition ID="IsSleepy"/>
            <ForceSuccess>
                <SequenceStar>
                    <Action ID="FindBed"/>
                    <Action ID="Move"/>
                </SequenceStar>
            </ForceSuccess>
            <Action ID="Sleep"/>
        </SequenceStar>
    </BehaviorTree>
    <!--  ===================================  -->
    <BehaviorTree ID="Thirst">
        <SequenceStar>
            <Condition ID="IsThirsty"/>
            <Sequence>
                <SequenceStar name="Thirst">
                    <Action ID="FindDrink"/>
                    <Action ID="Move"/>
                    <Action ID="PickUpItem"/>
                    <ForceSuccess>
                        <SequenceStar>
                            <Action ID="FindDining"/>
                            <Action ID="Move"/>
                        </SequenceStar>
                    </ForceSuccess>
                    <Action ID="Drink"/>
                </SequenceStar>
                <Condition ID="IsDrinkFull"/>
            </Sequence>
        </SequenceStar>
    </BehaviorTree>
    <!--  ===================================  -->
    <BehaviorTree ID="Trainer">
        <SequenceStar name="Trainer">
            <Condition ID="IsTrainer"/>
            <Action ID="FindTrainerPosition"/>
            <Action ID="Move"/>
            <Action ID="SuperviseTraining"/>

    </BehaviorTree>
    <!--  ===================================  -->
    <BehaviorTree ID="Training">

            <Condition ID="IsTrainingTime"/>

            <Action ID="Move"/>
            <Action ID="Train"/>
        </SequenceStar>
    </BehaviorTree>
    <!--  ===================================  -->
    <TreeNodesModel>
        <Action ID="AbortJob"/>
        <Condition ID="AllItemsInPlaceForJob"/>
        <Condition ID="AllPickedUp"/>
        <Action ID="AttackTarget"/>
        <Action ID="ButcherAnimal"/>
        <Action ID="CheckUniform"/>
        <Action ID="ClaimItems"/>
        <SubTree ID="Combat"/>
        <Action ID="Drink"/>
        <Action ID="DropAllItems"/>
        <Action ID="DropItem"/>
        <Action ID="DyeAnimal"/>
        <Action ID="Eat"/>
        <Action ID="EquipTool"/>
        <Action ID="EquipUniform"/>
        <Action ID="FinalMoveAnimal"/>
        <Action ID="FindBed"/>
        <Action ID="FindDining"/>
        <Action ID="FindDrink"/>
        <Action ID="FindFood"/>
        <Action ID="FindTool"/>
        <Action ID="FindTrainerPosition"/>

        <Action ID="FinishJob"/>
        <Action ID="GetItemDropPosition"/>
        <Action ID="GetJob"/>

        <SubTree ID="GetUniform"/>

        <Action ID="HarvestAnimal"/>
        <SubTree ID="Hunger"/>

<root main_tree_to_execute="MainTree">
	<BehaviorTree ID="MainTree">
		<KeepRunningUntilFailure>
			<Sequence>
				<Delay delay_msec="3000">
					<AntennaAction rate="0" intensity="10" left_blink_pattern="01" right_blink_pattern="10" />
				</Delay>
				<Delay delay_msec="3000">
					<AntennaAction rate="5" intensity="100" left_blink_pattern="01" right_blink_pattern="10" />
				</Delay>
        		<Delay delay_msec="9000">
          			<AntennaAction rate="10" intensity="100" left_blink_pattern="111100000" right_blink_pattern="00001111" />
        		</Delay>
			</Sequence>
		</KeepRunningUntilFailure>
	</BehaviorTree>
</root>

<root main_tree_to_execute = "MainTree">

    <BehaviorTree ID="MainTree">

        <Sequence name="main_sequence">
            <SetBlackboard output_key="move_goal" value="1;2;3" />
            <SubTree ID="MoveRobot" target="move_goal" output="move_result" />
            <SaySomething message="{move_result}"/>
        </Sequence>

    </BehaviorTree>

    <BehaviorTree ID="MoveRobot">
        <Fallback name="move_robot_main">
            <SequenceStar>
                <MoveBase       goal="{target}"/>
                <SetBlackboard output_key="output" value="mission accomplished" />
            </SequenceStar>
            <ForceFailure>
                <SetBlackboard output_key="output" value="mission failed" />
            </ForceFailure>
        </Fallback>
    </BehaviorTree>

</root>

    <BehaviorTree ID="MainTree">
       <Sequence name="root_sequence">
           <Pick  name="pick"/>
       </Sequence>
    </BehaviorTree>
</root>

<?xml version="1.0"?>
<root main_tree_to_execute="BehaviorTree">
    <!-- ////////// -->
    <BehaviorTree ID="BehaviorTree">
        <Repeat num_cycles="{num_cycles}">
            <Sequence>
                <Action ID="LTLPreCheck" ltl_state_current="{ltl_state_current}" ltl_state_desired_sequence="{ltl_state_desired_sequence}"/>
                <Action ID="MoveAction" action="{action}" move_base_finished="{move_base_finished}" move_base_idle="{move_base_idle}" nav_goal="{nav_goal}"/>
                <Action ID="UpdateLTL" action_sequence="{action_sequence}" ltl_state_desired_sequence="{ltl_state_desired_sequence}" nav_goal="{nav_goal}"/>
            </Sequence>
        </Repeat>
    </BehaviorTree>
    <!-- ////////// -->
    <TreeNodesModel>
        <Action ID="LTLPreCheck">
            <input_port name="ltl_state_current"/>
            <input_port name="ltl_state_desired_sequence"/>
        </Action>
        <Action ID="MoveAction">
            <output_port name="action"/>
            <input_port name="move_base_finished"/>
            <input_port name="move_base_idle"/>
            <input_port name="nav_goal"/>
        </Action>
        <Action ID="UpdateLTL">
            <inout_port name="action_sequence"/>
            <inout_port name="ltl_state_desired_sequence"/>
            <output_port name="nav_goal"/>
        </Action>
    </TreeNodesModel>
    <!-- ////////// -->
</root>

<?xml version="1.0"?>
<root main_tree_to_execute="BehaviorTree">
    <!-- ////////// -->
    <BehaviorTree ID="BehaviorTree">
        <Repeat num_cycles="{num_cycles}">
            <Sequence>
                <Fallback>
                    <Condition ID="LTLPreCheck" ltl_state_current="{ltl_state_current}" ltl_state_desired_sequence="{ltl_state_desired_sequence}" ltl_state_executed_sequence="{ltl_state_executed_sequence}"/>
                    <ForceFailure>
                        <Action ID="ReplanningRequestLevel2" ltl_state_current="{ltl_state_current}" ltl_state_executed_sequence="{ltl_state_executed_sequence}" replanning_request="{replanning_request}"/>
                    </ForceFailure>
                </Fallback>
                <ReactiveSequence>
                    <Fallback>
                        <Action ID="FakeDetectionLevel1" replanning_fake_input="{replanning_fake_input}"/>
                        <ForceFailure>
                            <Action ID="ReplanningRequestLevel1" ltl_state_current="{ltl_state_current}" ltl_state_executed_sequence="{ltl_state_executed_sequence}" replanning_request="{replanning_request}"/>
                        </ForceFailure>
                    </Fallback>
                    <Fallback>
                        <Condition ID="ReactiveLTLStateCheck" ltl_state_current="{ltl_state_current}" ltl_state_desired_sequence="{ltl_state_desired_sequence}"/>
                        <ForceFailure>
                            <Action ID="ReplanningRequestLevel2" ltl_state_current="{ltl_state_current}" ltl_state_executed_sequence="{ltl_state_executed_sequence}" replanning_request="{replanning_request}"/>
                        </ForceFailure>
                    </Fallback>
                    <Fallback>
                        <Action ID="FakeDetectionLevel3" replanning_fake_input="{replanning_fake_input}"/>
                        <ForceFailure>
                            <Action ID="ReplanningRequestLevel3" ltl_state_current="{ltl_state_current}" ltl_state_executed_sequence="{ltl_state_executed_sequence}" replanning_request="{replanning_request}"/>
                        </ForceFailure>
                    </Fallback>
                    <Fallback>
                        <Switch6 case_1="move" case_2="stay" case_3="pick" case_4="drop" case_5="reset" case_6="start_guiding" variable="{bt_action_type}">
                            <Action ID="MoveAction" bt_action_type="{bt_action_type}" current_action="{current_action}" goal_sent="{goal_sent}" move_base_finished="{move_base_finished}" move_base_idle="{move_base_idle}"/>
                            <Action ID="StayAction" bt_action_type="{bt_action_type}" current_action="{current_action}" ltl_state_current="{ltl_state_current}"/>
                            <Action ID="PickAction" bt_action_type="{bt_action_type}" current_action="{current_action}" ltl_state_current="{ltl_state_current}"/>
                            <Action ID="DropActionNew" bt_action_type="{bt_action_type}" current_action="{current_action}" ltl_state_current="{ltl_state_current}"/>
                            <Action ID="ResetAction" bt_action_type="{bt_action_type}" current_action="{current_action}" ltl_state_current="{ltl_state_current}"/>
                            <Action ID="GuideActionNew" bt_action_type="{bt_action_type}" current_action="{current_action}" ltl_state_current="{ltl_state_current}"/>
                            <AlwaysFailure/>
                        </Switch6>
                        <ForceFailure>
                            <Action ID="ReplanningRequestLevel3" ltl_state_current="{ltl_state_current}" ltl_state_executed_sequence="{ltl_state_executed_sequence}" replanning_request="{replanning_request}"/>
                        </ForceFailure>
                    </Fallback>
                </ReactiveSequence>
                <Action ID="UpdateLTL" action_sequence="{action_sequence}" action_sequence_executed="{action_sequence_executed}" bt_action_type="{bt_action_type}" current_action="{current_action}" ltl_state_desired_sequence="{ltl_state_desired_sequence}"/>
            </Sequence>
        </Repeat>
    </BehaviorTree>
    <!-- ////////// -->
    <TreeNodesModel>
        <Action ID="BackNormalAction">
            <input_port name="bt_action_type"/>
            <input_port name="current_action"/>
            <inout_port name="ltl_state_current"/>
        </Action>
        <Action ID="DropAction">
            <input_port name="bt_action_type"/>
            <input_port name="current_action"/>
            <inout_port name="ltl_state_current"/>
        </Action>
        <Action ID="DropActionNew">
            <input_port name="bt_action_type"/>
            <input_port name="current_action"/>
            <inout_port name="ltl_state_current"/>
        </Action>
        <Action ID="FakeDetectionLevel1">
            <input_port name="replanning_fake_input"/>
        </Action>
        <Action ID="FakeDetectionLevel2">
            <input_port name="replanning_fake_input"/>
        </Action>
        <Action ID="FakeDetectionLevel3">
            <input_port name="replanning_fake_input"/>
        </Action>
        <Action ID="GuideActionNew">
            <input_port name="bt_action_type"/>
            <input_port name="current_action"/>
            <inout_port name="ltl_state_current"/>
        </Action>
        <Condition ID="LTLPreCheck">
            <input_port name="ltl_state_current"/>
            <input_port name="ltl_state_desired_sequence"/>
            <inout_port name="ltl_state_executed_sequence"/>
        </Condition>
        <Action ID="LocomotionStart">
            <input_port name="locomotion_status"/>
        </Action>
        <Condition ID="LocomotionStatusCheck">
            <input_port name="locomotion_status"/>
        </Condition>
        <Action ID="MoveAction">
            <input_port name="bt_action_type"/>
            <input_port name="current_action"/>
            <output_port name="goal_sent"/>
            <input_port name="move_base_finished"/>
            <input_port name="move_base_idle"/>
        </Action>
        <Action ID="PickAction">
            <input_port name="bt_action_type"/>
            <input_port name="current_action"/>
            <inout_port name="ltl_state_current"/>
        </Action>
        <Condition ID="ReactiveLTLStateCheck">
            <input_port name="ltl_state_current"/>
            <input_port name="ltl_state_desired_sequence"/>
        </Condition>
        <Action ID="RecoveryStand">
            <input_port name="locomotion_status"/>
        </Action>
        <Action ID="ReplanningRequestLevel1">
            <input_port name="ltl_state_current"/>
            <inout_port name="ltl_state_executed_sequence"/>
            <inout_port name="replanning_request"/>
        </Action>
        <Action ID="ReplanningRequestLevel2">
            <input_port name="ltl_state_current"/>
            <inout_port name="ltl_state_executed_sequence"/>
            <inout_port name="replanning_request"/>
        </Action>
        <Action ID="ReplanningRequestLevel3">
            <input_port name="ltl_state_current"/>
            <inout_port name="ltl_state_executed_sequence"/>
            <inout_port name="replanning_request"/>
        </Action>
        <Action ID="ResetAction">
            <input_port name="bt_action_type"/>
            <input_port name="current_action"/>
            <inout_port name="ltl_state_current"/>
        </Action>
        <Action ID="StayAction">
            <input_port name="bt_action_type"/>
            <input_port name="current_action"/>
            <inout_port name="ltl_state_current"/>
        </Action>
        <Action ID="SynchronizedTransitionAction">
            <input_port name="bt_action_type"/>
            <input_port name="current_action"/>
            <inout_port name="ltl_state_current"/>
        </Action>
        <Action ID="UpdateLTL">
            <inout_port name="action_sequence"/>
            <inout_port name="action_sequence_executed"/>
            <output_port name="bt_action_type"/>
            <output_port name="current_action"/>
            <inout_port name="ltl_state_desired_sequence"/>
        </Action>
    </TreeNodesModel>
    <!-- ////////// -->
</root>

<root main_tree_to_execute = "MainTree">
    <BehaviorTree ID="MainTree">
        <Repeat num_cycles="3">
            <Sequence>
                <!-- The goal value="position-x;position-y;orientaion-z;orientation-w" -->
                <SetBlackboard output_key="Goal_a" value="-0.579;-1.341;0.0;1.0" />
                <SetBlackboard output_key="Goal_b" value="5.214;-1.533;0.0;1.0" />
                <SetBlackboard output_key="Goal_c" value="-1.588;1.253;0.0;1.0" />
                <Sequence>
                    <SubTree ID="MoveRobot" target="Goal_a" />
                    <SubTree ID="MoveRobot" target="Goal_b" />
                    <SubTree ID="MoveRobot" target="Goal_c" />
                </Sequence>
            </Sequence>
        </Repeat>
    </BehaviorTree>

    <BehaviorTree ID="MoveRobot">
        <Sequence name="SetGoal">
            <Nav2Client goal="{target}" />
        </Sequence>
    </BehaviorTree>
</root>

<root main_tree_to_execute = "MainTree" >
     <BehaviorTree ID="MainTree">
        <Sequence name="root_sequence">
            <!-- Utilizo Fallback por que en caso de que se cumpla -->
            <!-- la primera condicion, no es necesario AproachRoom -->
            <Fallback name="check_room"> <!-- Fallback: comprueba si esta en la habitacion, si no, va a ella-->
                <inRoom         name="in_room"        room="{room}"/>
                <ApproachRoom   name="approach_room"  room="{room}"/>
            </Fallback>
            <setTF         name="setTF"          object="{object}"/>
            <ReactiveSequence name="check_room"> <!-- Secuencia reactiva: si turnToTf no da success, no se ejcuta approach object-->
                <turnToTf        name="turn_to_tf"        object="{object}"/>
                <ApproachObject name="approach_object" object="{object}"/> <!-- Si esta en frente del objeto, se acerca-->
            </ReactiveSequence>
        </Sequence>
     </BehaviorTree>
 </root>

<!--
  This Behavior Tree replans the global path periodically at 1 Hz and it also has
  recovery actions specific to planning / control as well as general system issues.
  This will be continuous if a kinematically valid planner is selected.
-->
<root main_tree_to_execute="MainTree">
  <BehaviorTree ID="MainTree">
    <RecoveryNode number_of_retries="6" name="NavigateRecovery">
      <PipelineSequence name="NavigateWithReplanning">
        <RateController hz="1.0">
          <RecoveryNode number_of_retries="1" name="ComputePathToPose">
            <ComputePathToPose goal="{goal}" path="{path}" planner_id="GridBased"/>
            <ReactiveFallback name="ComputePathToPoseRecoveryFallback">
              <GoalUpdated/>
              <ClearEntireCostmap name="ClearGlobalCostmap-Context" service_name="global_costmap/clear_entirely_global_costmap"/>
            </ReactiveFallback>
          </RecoveryNode>
        </RateController>
        <RecoveryNode number_of_retries="1" name="FollowPath">
          <FollowPath path="{path}" controller_id="FollowPath"/>
          <ReactiveFallback name="FollowPathRecoveryFallback">
            <GoalUpdated/>
            <ClearEntireCostmap name="ClearLocalCostmap-Context" service_name="local_costmap/clear_entirely_local_costmap"/>
          </ReactiveFallback>
        </RecoveryNode>
      </PipelineSequence>
      <ReactiveFallback name="RecoveryFallback">
        <GoalUpdated/>
        <RoundRobin name="RecoveryActions">
          <Sequence name="ClearingActions">
            <ClearEntireCostmap name="ClearLocalCostmap-Subtree" service_name="local_costmap/clear_entirely_local_costmap"/>
            <ClearEntireCostmap name="ClearGlobalCostmap-Subtree" service_name="global_costmap/clear_entirely_global_costmap"/>
          </Sequence>
          <Spin spin_dist="1.57"/>
          <Wait wait_duration="5"/>
          <BackUp backup_dist="0.15" backup_speed="0.025"/>
        </RoundRobin>
      </ReactiveFallback>
    </RecoveryNode>
  </BehaviorTree>
</root>

        <Sequence>
            <FloatParameterRequest title="Bitte geben Sie x, y und z in [mm] an"
                                   value="{x}" key="x" min="-1000" max="1000"/>
            <FloatParameterRequest value="{y}" key="y" min="-1000" max="1000"/>
            <FloatParameterRequest value="{z}" key="z" min="-1000" max="1000"/>
            <FloatParameterRequest msg="Geben Sie die Greiferposition von 0 [open] bis 1 [closed] an"
                                   value="{gripper_position}" key="gripper_position" min="0" max="1"/>
            <ArmMovement x="{x}" y="{y}" z="{z}" gripper_position="{gripper_position}"/>
        </Sequence>
    </BehaviorTree>

    <BehaviorTree ID="BaseMovementWithRequest">
        <Sequence>
            <FloatParameterRequest title="Bitte geben Sie x und y in [m] an"
                                   value="{x}" key="x" min="-10" max="10"/>
            <FloatParameterRequest value="{y}" key="y" min="-10" max="10"/>
            <BaseMovement x="{x}" y="{y}"/>
        </Sequence>
    </BehaviorTree>

    <BehaviorTree ID="BatteryChargingWithRequest">
        <Sequence>
            <FloatParameterRequest title="Bitte geben Sie die Zielladung an von 0 [empty] bis 1 [full]"
                                   value="{goal_percentage}" key="goal_percentage" min="0" max="1"/>
            <BatteryCharging goal_percentage="{goal_percentage}"/>
        </Sequence>
    </BehaviorTree>

    <BehaviorTree ID="DevicePairingWithRequest">
        <Sequence>
            <!--pairing_mode und device_type müssen den Konstanten im .action file entsprechen-->
            <IntParameterRequest title="Bitte geben Sie den Kopplungsmodus und das Gerät an"
                                   options="pair,unpair"
                                   value="{pairing_mode}"/>
            <IntParameterRequest options="wheelchair,rollator,hospitalbed,chargingstation"
                                   value="{device_type}"/>
            <DevicePairing pairing_mode="{pairing_mode}" device_type="{device_type}"/>
        </Sequence>
    </BehaviorTree>

    <BehaviorTree ID="Emergency">
        <Sequence>
            <StringParameterRequest title="Emergency finished?" 
                                    msg="type [y] or [n]"
                                    value="{confirm}"/>
            <CheckBlackboard input="{confirm}" compare_to="y" />
        </Sequence>
    </BehaviorTree>

    <BehaviorTree ID="FreeWalking">
        <Sequence>
            <!--room1 = (2,2)-->
            <BaseMovement x="2" y="2"/>
            <StringParameterRequest title="Start walking to destination?" 
                                    msg="type [y] or [n]"
                                    value="{confirm}"/>
            <CheckBlackboard input="{confirm}" compare_to="y" />
            <!--room2 = (5,5)-->
            <BaseMovement x="5" y="5"/>
            <StringParameterRequest title="Patient arrived?" 
                                    msg="type [y] or [n]"
                                    value="{confirm}"/>
            <CheckBlackboard input="{confirm}" compare_to="y" />
            <!--waiting_area = (0,0)-->
            <BaseMovement x="0" y="0"/>
        </Sequence>
    </BehaviorTree>

    <BehaviorTree ID="GuidedWalking">
        <Sequence>
            <!--room1 = (2,2)-->
            <BaseMovement x="2" y="2"/>
            <!--arm_support_position = (200,200,0,0)-->
            <ArmMovement x="200" y="200" z="0" gripper_position="0"/>
            <StringParameterRequest title="Start walking to destination?" 
                                    msg="type [y] or [n]"
                                    value="{confirm}"/>
            <CheckBlackboard input="{confirm}" compare_to="y" />
            <!--room2 = (5,5)-->
            <BaseMovement x="5" y="5"/>
            <StringParameterRequest title="Patient arrived?" 
                                    msg="type [y] or [n]"
                                    value="{confirm}"/>
            <CheckBlackboard input="{confirm}" compare_to="y" />
            <!--arm_home_position = (0,0,0,0)-->
            <ArmMovement x="0" y="0" z="0" gripper_position="0"/>
            <!--waiting_area = (0,0)-->
            <BaseMovement x="0" y="0"/>
        </Sequence>
    </BehaviorTree>

    <BehaviorTree ID="Recharge">
        <Sequence>
            <!--charging_station = (-5,-5)-->
            <BaseMovement x="-5" y="-5"/>
            <!--mode 1 = pair, type 4 = chargingstation-->
            <DevicePairing pairing_mode="1" device_type="4"/>
            <BatteryCharging goal_percentage="1"/>
            <!--mode 2 = unpair, type 4 = chargingstation-->
            <DevicePairing pairing_mode="2" device_type="4"/>
            <!--waiting_area = (0,0)-->
            <BaseMovement x="0" y="0"/>
        </Sequence>
    </BehaviorTree>

    <BehaviorTree ID="TransportWithDevice">
        <Sequence>
            <!--room1 = (2,2)-->
            <BaseMovement x="2" y="2"/>
            <StringParameterRequest title="Start pairing and move to destination?" 
                                    msg="type [y] or [n]"
                                    value="{confirm}"/>
            <CheckBlackboard input="{confirm}" compare_to="y" />
            <IntParameterRequest options="wheelchair,rollator,hospitalbed,chargingstation"
                                   value="{device_type}"/>
            <!--mode 1 = pair-->
            <DevicePairing pairing_mode="1" device_type="{device_type}"/>
            <!--room2 = (5,5)-->
            <BaseMovement x="5" y="5"/>
            <StringParameterRequest title="Patient arrived?" 
                                    msg="type [y] or [n]"
                                    value="{confirm}"/>
            <CheckBlackboard input="{confirm}" compare_to="y" />
            <!--mode 2 = unpair-->
            <DevicePairing pairing_mode="2" device_type="{device_type}"/>
            <!--waiting_area = (0,0)-->
            <BaseMovement x="0" y="0"/>
        </Sequence>
    </BehaviorTree>

    <BehaviorTree ID="MainTree">
        <ReactiveSequence>
            <CheckStop/>
            <CheckDiagnosticStatus/>
            <Fallback>
                <CheckBattery/>
                <Recharge/>
            </Fallback>
            <Fallback>
                <CheckPatientCondition/>
                <Emergency/>
            </Fallback>
            <Sequence>
                <StringParameterRequest title="Select a behavior"
                                       options="FreeW,GuidedW,TransportWD"
                                       value="{selected_behavior}"/>
                <BehaviorSwitch variable="{selected_behavior}" case_1="FreeW" case_2="GuidedW" case_3="TransportWD">
                    <FreeWalking/>
                    <GuidedWalking/>
                    <TransportWithDevice/>
                    <AlwaysFailureNode name="default"/>
                </BehaviorSwitch>
            </Sequence>
        </ReactiveSequence>
    </BehaviorTree>

    <TreeNodesModel>
        <SubTree ID="BaseMovementWithRequest"/>
        <SubTree ID="ArmMovementWithRequest"/>
        <SubTree ID="BatteryChargingWithRequest"/>
        <SubTree ID="DevicePairingWithRequest"/>
        <SubTree ID="FreeWalking"/>
        <SubTree ID="GuidedWalking"/>
        <SubTree ID="TransportWithDevice"/>
        <SubTree ID="Emergency"/>
        <SubTree ID="Recharge"/>

        <Condition ID="CheckStop"/>
        <Condition ID="CheckBattery"/>
        <Condition ID="CheckDiagnosticStatus"/>
        <Condition ID="CheckPatientCondition"/>
        <Condition ID="CheckBlackboard"/>
            <input_port name="input" type="std::string"/>
            <input_port name="compare_to" type="std::string"/>

        <Decorator ID="BehaviorSwitch"/>

        <Action ID="DevicePairing">
            <input_port name="pairing_mode" type="int"/>
            <input_port name="device_type" type="int"/>
        </Action>
        <Action ID="ArmMovement">
            <input_port name="x" type="float"/>
            <input_port name="y" type="float"/>
            <input_port name="z" type="float"/>
            <input_port name="gripper" type="float"/>
        </Action>
        <Action ID="BatteryCharging">
            <input_port name="goal_percentage" type="float"/>
        </Action>
        <Action ID="BaseMovement">
            <input_port name="x" type="float"/>
            <input_port name="y" type="float"/>
        </Action>
        <Action ID="StringParameterRequest">
            <output_port name="value" type="std::string"/>
            <input_port name="title" type="std::string"/>
            <input_port name="msg" type="std::string"/>
            <input_port name="key" type="std::string"/>
            <input_port name="min" type="std::string"/>
            <input_port name="max" type="std::string"/>
            <input_port name="default_value" type="std::string"/>
            <input_port name="options" type="std::string"/>
        </Action>
        <Action ID="FloatParameterRequest">
            <output_port name="value" type="float"/>
            <input_port name="title" type="std::string"/>
            <input_port name="msg" type="std::string"/>
            <input_port name="key" type="std::string"/>
            <input_port name="min" type="std::string"/>
            <input_port name="max" type="std::string"/>
            <input_port name="default_value" type="std::string"/>
            <input_port name="options" type="std::string"/>
        </Action>
        <Action ID="IntParameterRequest">
            <output_port name="value" type="int"/>
            <input_port name="title" type="std::string"/>
            <input_port name="msg" type="std::string"/>
            <input_port name="key" type="std::string"/>
            <input_port name="min" type="std::string"/>
            <input_port name="max" type="std::string"/>
            <input_port name="default_value" type="std::string"/>
            <input_port name="options" type="std::string"/>
        </Action>
        <Action ID="AlwaysFailureNode"/>
    </TreeNodesModel>
 </root>

<!--
  This Behavior Tree replans the global path periodically at 1 Hz and it also has
  recovery actions.
-->
<root main_tree_to_execute="MainTree">
  <BehaviorTree ID="MainTree">
    <RecoveryNode number_of_retries="6" name="NavigateRecovery">
      <PipelineSequence name="NavigateWithReplanning">
        <RateController hz="1.0">
          <RecoveryNode number_of_retries="1" name="ComputePathToPose">
            <ComputePathToPose goal="{goal}" path="{path}" planner_id="GridBased"/>
            <ClearEntireCostmap name="ClearGlobalCostmap-Context" service_name="global_costmap/clear_entirely_global_costmap"/>
          </RecoveryNode>
        </RateController>
        <RecoveryNode number_of_retries="1" name="FollowPath">
          <FollowPath path="{path}" controller_id="FollowPath"/>
          <ClearEntireCostmap name="ClearLocalCostmap-Context" service_name="local_costmap/clear_entirely_local_costmap"/>
        </RecoveryNode>
      </PipelineSequence>
      <ReactiveFallback name="RecoveryFallback">
        <GoalUpdated/>
        <SequenceStar name="RecoveryActions">
          <ClearEntireCostmap name="ClearLocalCostmap-Subtree" service_name="local_costmap/clear_entirely_local_costmap"/>
          <ClearEntireCostmap name="ClearGlobalCostmap-Subtree" service_name="global_costmap/clear_entirely_global_costmap"/>
          <Spin spin_dist="1.57"/>
          <Wait wait_duration="5"/>
        </SequenceStar>
      </ReactiveFallback>
    </RecoveryNode>
  </BehaviorTree>
</root>

<?xml version="1.0"?>
<root main_tree_to_execute="BehaviorTree">
    <!-- ////////// -->
    <BehaviorTree ID="BehaviorTree">
        <Fallback name="Priorities">
            <Inverter>
                <Fallback name="Avoid Collisions">
                    <Condition ID="Condition" name="No Obstacle Ahead?"/>
                    <Fallback>
                        <Action ID="Behaviour" name="Replan Around Obstacle"/>
                        <Action ID="Behaviour" name="Emergency Brake"/>
                    </Fallback>
                </Fallback>
            </Inverter>
            <Fallback name="Road Features">
                <SubTree ID="Intersection"/>
                <SubTree ID="Roundabout"/>
                <SubTree ID="Stop"/>
            </Fallback>
            <Fallback name="">
                <Inverter>
                    <Fallback>
                        <Condition ID="Condition" name="Not Slowed by Car in Front?"/>
                        <Fallback>
                            <SubTree ID="Multi-Lane"/>
                            <SubTree ID="Single-Lane"/>
                        </Fallback>
                    </Fallback>
                </Inverter>
                <Sequence>
                    <Condition ID="Condition" name="Right Lane Available?"/>
                    <Condition ID="Condition" name="Not Slowed by Car in Front Right?"/>
                    <Action ID="Behaviour" name="Wait for Right Lane Free"/>
                    <Action ID="Behaviour" name="Switch Lane Right"/>
                </Sequence>
            </Fallback>
            <Action ID="Behaviour" name="Cruise"/>
        </Fallback>
    </BehaviorTree>
    <!-- ////////// -->
    <BehaviorTree ID="Intersection">
        <Sequence>
            <Condition ID="Condition" name="Intersection Ahead"/>
            <Sequence>
                <Action ID="Behaviour" name="Approach Intersection"/>
                <Action ID="Behaviour" name="Wait"/>
                <Action ID="Behaviour" name="Enter Intersection"/>
                <Action ID="Behaviour" name="Leave Intersection"/>
            </Sequence>
        </Sequence>
    </BehaviorTree>
    <!-- ////////// -->
    <BehaviorTree ID="Multi-Lane">
        <Fallback>
            <Sequence>
                <Condition ID="Condition" name="Multi-Lane?"/>
                <Condition ID="Condition" name="Left Lane available?"/>
                <Action ID="Behaviour" name="Wait for left lane free"/>
                <Action ID="Behaviour" name="switch lane to left"/>
            </Sequence>
        </Fallback>
    </BehaviorTree>
    <!-- ////////// -->
    <BehaviorTree ID="Roundabout">
        <Sequence>
            <Condition ID="Condition" name="Roundabout Ahead?"/>
            <Sequence>
                <Action ID="Behaviour" name="Approach Roundabout"/>
                <Action ID="Behaviour" name="Wait"/>
                <Action ID="Behaviour" name="Enter"/>
                <Action ID="Behaviour" name="Leave"/>
            </Sequence>
        </Sequence>
    </BehaviorTree>
    <!-- ////////// -->
    <BehaviorTree ID="Single-Lane">
        <Sequence>
            <Condition ID="Condition" name="Single Lane with dotted Line?"/>
            <Action ID="Behaviour" name="Wait Left Lane Free"/>
            <Action ID="Behaviour" name="Switch Lane Left"/>
            <Fallback>
                <Sequence>
                    <Condition ID="Condition" name="Overtaking Possible"/>
                    <Action ID="Behaviour" name="Overtake"/>
                    <Action ID="Behaviour" name="Switch Lane Right"/>
                </Sequence>
                <Action ID="Behaviour" name="Switch Lane Right"/>
            </Fallback>
        </Sequence>
    </BehaviorTree>
    <!-- ////////// -->
    <BehaviorTree ID="Stop">
        <Sequence>
            <Condition ID="Condition" name="Stop Ahead?"/>
            <Sequence>
                <Action ID="Behaviour" name="Approach"/>
                <Action ID="Behaviour" name="Wait"/>
                <Action ID="Behaviour" name="Go"/>
            </Sequence>
        </Sequence>
    </BehaviorTree>
    <!-- ////////// -->
    <TreeNodesModel>
        <Action ID="Behaviour"/>
        <Condition ID="Condition"/>
        <SubTree ID="Intersection"/>
        <SubTree ID="Multi-Lane"/>
        <SubTree ID="Roundabout"/>
        <SubTree ID="Single-Lane"/>
        <SubTree ID="Stop"/>
    </TreeNodesModel>
    <!-- ////////// -->
</root>

<root main_tree_to_execute = "PegTree" >
    <BehaviorTree ID="PegTree">
    <ReactiveFallback name="root_sequence">
        <ReactiveSequence name="goal_condition">
            <EEPositionDistance name="goal_check"
                threshold="0.05"
                target_x="-0.6"
                target_y="0.0"
                target_z="0.64"
                ee_x="{ee_x}"
                ee_y="{ee_y}"
                ee_z="{ee_z}"/>
            <Parallel name="mg_config_goal_and_check" success_threshold="1" failure_threshold="1">
                <SetMGSin   name="mg_sinus"
                    mp_ampl="0"
                    mp_freq="0"
                    mg_ampl="{mg_ampl}"
                    mg_freq="{mg_freq}"/>
                <SetMGGoal   name="mg_goal1"
                    mp_param_x="-0.6"
                    mp_param_y="0.0"
                    mp_param_z="0.73"
                    mg_trans_x="{mg_trans_x}"
                    mg_trans_y="{mg_trans_y}"
                    mg_trans_z="{mg_trans_z}"/>
                <EEPositionDistance name="goal_check"
                    threshold="0.05"
                    target_x="-0.6"
                    target_y="0.0"
                    target_z="0.64"
                    ee_x="{ee_x}"
                    ee_y="{ee_y}"
                    ee_z="{ee_z}"/>
            </Parallel>
        </ReactiveSequence>
        <ReactiveSequence name="search_motion">
            <EEZThreshold   name="ee_z_threshold" threshold="{z_threshold}" ee_z="{ee_z}" above="false"/>
                <SetMGSin   name="mg_sinus"
                    mp_ampl="{mp_ampl}"
                    mp_freq="{mp_freq}"
                    mg_ampl="{mg_ampl}"
                    mg_freq="{mg_freq}"/>
        </ReactiveSequence>
        <Parallel name="mg_config" success_threshold="1" failure_threshold="1">
            <SetMGSin   name="mg_sinus"
                mp_ampl="0"
                mp_freq="0"
                mg_ampl="{mg_ampl}"
                mg_freq="{mg_freq}"/>
            <SetMGGoal   name="mg_goal1"
                mp_param_x="{mp_1_x}"
                mp_param_y="{mp_1_y}"
                mp_param_z="{mp_1_z}"
                mg_trans_x="{mg_trans_x}"
                mg_trans_y="{mg_trans_y}"
                mg_trans_z="{mg_trans_z}"/>
        </Parallel>
    </ReactiveFallback>
    </BehaviorTree>
</root>

<?xml version="1.0"?>
<root main_tree_to_execute="BehaviorTree">
    <!-- ////////// -->
    <BehaviorTree ID="BehaviorTree">
        <Parallel threshold="1">
            <Repeat num_cycles="-1">
                <Action ID="VariantAction" value="{variant}"/>
            </Repeat>
            <Sequence>
                <Action ID="peoplerecognition"/>
                <Action ID="moveRoboterPosition" approachRadius="200" x="5630" y="-12000"/>
                <Switch2 case_1="one" case_2="two" variable="{variant}">
                    <Fallback name="SearchThomas">
                        <Fallback name="Room1">
                            <Sequence name="SearchRoom1">
                                <Action ID="moveRoboterPosition" approachRadius="200" name="Door2" x="7520" y="-12000"/>
                                <Action ID="moveRoboterPosition" approachRadius="200" x="7520" y="-9040"/>
                                <Action ID="getPersonPose" personname="THOMAS" x="{x_}" y="{y_}" z="{z_}"/>
                                <Action ID="moveRoboterPosition" approachRadius="500" name="MoveToPerson" x="{x_}" y="{y_}"/>
                                <Action ID="moveRoboterPosition" approachRadius="200" name="Door2" x="7520" y="-12000"/>
                            </Sequence>
                            <ForceFailure>
                                <Action ID="moveRoboterPosition" approachRadius="200" name="Door2" x="7520" y="-12000"/>
                            </ForceFailure>
                        </Fallback>
                        <Fallback name="Room2">
                            <Sequence name="SearchRoom4">
                                <Action ID="moveRoboterPosition" approachRadius="200" name="Door4" x="14500" y="-12000"/>
                                <Action ID="moveRoboterPosition" approachRadius="200" x="14400" y="-9640"/>
                                <Action ID="getPersonPose" personname="THOMAS" x="{x_}" y="{y_}" z="{z_}"/>
                                <Action ID="moveRoboterPosition" approachRadius="500" name="MoveToPerson" x="{x_}" y="{y_}"/>
                                <Action ID="moveRoboterPosition" approachRadius="200" name="Door4" x="14500" y="-12000"/>
                            </Sequence>
                            <ForceFailure>
                                <Action ID="moveRoboterPosition" approachRadius="200" name="Door4" x="14500" y="-12000"/>
                            </ForceFailure>
                        </Fallback>
                        <Sequence name="Recharge">
                            <Action ID="moveRoboterPosition" approachRadius="200" name="Door8" x="23200" y="-12000"/>
                            <Action ID="moveRoboterPosition" approachRadius="10" name="GotoCharger" x="23200" y="-14800"/>
                        </Sequence>
                    </Fallback>
                </Switch2>
            </Sequence>
        </Parallel>
    </BehaviorTree>
    <!-- ////////// -->
    <TreeNodesModel>
        <Action ID="VariantAction">
            <output_port default="{variant}" name="value"/>
        </Action>
        <Action ID="activateLocalization"/>
        <Action ID="approachLocation">
            <input_port default="1" name="locationId"/>
        </Action>
        <Action ID="approachWall"/>
        <Action ID="deactivateLocalization"/>
        <Action ID="getBaseCharging">
            <output_port default="{charging}" name="charging"/>
        </Action>
        <Action ID="getPersonPose">
            <input_port default="MARIA" name="personname"/>
            <output_port default="{x_}" name="x"/>
            <output_port default="{y_}" name="y"/>
            <output_port default="{z_}" name="z"/>
        </Action>
        <Action ID="initNavigation"/>
        <Action ID="loadMap"/>
        <Action ID="loadNavigationMap">
            <input_port default="navigation-map" name="mapname"/>
        </Action>
        <Action ID="moveRoboterBackwardsLocation"/>
        <Action ID="moveRoboterBackwardsRelative"/>
        <Action ID="moveRoboterOrientateRobotAbs"/>
        <Action ID="moveRoboterOrientateRobotRel"/>
        <Action ID="moveRoboterPosition">
            <input_port default="50" name="approachRadius"/>
            <input_port default="0" name="x"/>
            <input_port default="0" name="y"/>
        </Action>
        <Action ID="peoplerecognition"/>
        <Action ID="setRobotPose">
            <input_port default="0" name="x"/>
            <input_port default="0" name="y"/>
            <input_port default="0" name="yaw"/>
        </Action>
        <Action ID="startJoystickNavigation"/>
        <Action ID="startReactiveNavigation"/>
        <Action ID="stopJoystickNavigation"/>
        <Action ID="stopReactiveNavigation"/>
        <Action ID="triggerGlobalLocalization"/>
    </TreeNodesModel>
    <!-- ////////// -->
</root>

<?xml version="1.0"?>
<root main_tree_to_execute="BehaviorTree">
    <!-- ////////// -->
    <BehaviorTree ID="BehaviorTree">
        <Sequence>
            <Fallback>
                <Inverter>
                    <Action ID="CheckBattery"/>
                </Inverter>
                <Inverter>
                    <Action ID="CleanAction"/>
                </Inverter>
            </Fallback>
            <Action ID="Recharge"/>
        </Sequence>
    </BehaviorTree>
    <!-- ////////// -->
    <TreeNodesModel>
        <Action ID="CheckBattery"/>
        <Action ID="CleanAction"/>
        <Action ID="Recharge"/>
    </TreeNodesModel>
    <!-- ////////// -->
</root>

<!--
  This Behavior Tree replans the global path periodically at 1 Hz.
-->

<root main_tree_to_execute="MainTree">
  <BehaviorTree ID="MainTree">
    <SequenceStar name="NavigateWithReplanning">
      <SplitGoal goal="{goal}"
        get_out_teb_need="{getOutTebNeed}" get_out_teb_goal="{getOutTebGoal}"
        nominal_teb_need="{nominalTebNeed}" nominal_teb_goal="{nominalTebGoal}"
        get_in_teb_need="{getInTebNeed}" get_in_teb_goal="{getInTebGoal}"/>

      <Fallback>
        <Inverter>
          <BooleanCondition boolean="{getOutTebNeed}"/>
        </Inverter>

        <PipelineSequence>
          <RateController hz="2.0">
            <ComputePathToPose goal="{getOutTebGoal}" path="{pathGetOut}" planner_id="GridBased"/>
          </RateController>
          <FollowPath path="{pathGetOut}" controller_id="AccurateController"/>
        </PipelineSequence>
      </Fallback>

      <Fallback>
        <Inverter>
          <BooleanCondition boolean="{nominalTebNeed}"/>
        </Inverter>

        <PipelineSequence>
          <RateController hz="2.0">
            <ComputePathToPose goal="{nominalTebGoal}" path="{pathNominal}" planner_id="GridBased"/>
          </RateController>
          <FollowPath path="{pathNominal}" controller_id="NominalController"/>
        </PipelineSequence>
      </Fallback>

      <Fallback>
        <Inverter>
          <BooleanCondition boolean="{getInTebNeed}"/>
        </Inverter>
        <PipelineSequence>
          <RateController hz="2.0">
            <ComputePathToPose goal="{getInTebGoal}" path="{pathGetIn}" planner_id="GridBased"/>
          </RateController>
          <FollowPath path="{pathGetIn}" controller_id="AccurateController"/>
        </PipelineSequence>
      </Fallback>
    </SequenceStar>
  </BehaviorTree>
</root>

<root main_tree_to_execute="MainTree">

			</Sequence>
		</Repeat>
	</BehaviorTree>
</root>

<root main_tree_to_execute="MainTree">

    </ReactiveFallback>
  </BehaviorTree>
</root>

<?xml version="1.0"?>
<root main_tree_to_execute="BehaviorTree">
    <!-- ////////// -->
    <BehaviorTree ID="BehaviorTree">
        <Repeat num_cycles="{num_cycles}">
            <Sequence>
                <Fallback>
                    <Action ID="LTLPreCheck" ltl_state_current="{ltl_state_current}" ltl_state_desired_sequence="{ltl_state_desired_sequence}" ltl_state_executed_sequence="{ltl_state_executed_sequence}"/>
                    <ForceFailure>
                        <Action ID="ReplanningRequestLevel2" ltl_state_current="{ltl_state_current}" ltl_state_executed_sequence="{ltl_state_executed_sequence}" replanning_request="{replanning_request}"/>
                    </ForceFailure>
                </Fallback>
                <ReactiveSequence>
                    <Fallback>
                        <RetryUntilSuccesful num_attempts="3">
                            <Fallback>
                                <Action ID="LocomotionStatusCheck" locomotion_status="{locomotion_status}"/>
                                <Sequence>
                                    <Action ID="RecoveryStand" locomotion_status="{locomotion_status}"/>
                                    <Delay delay_msec="2000">
                                        <Action ID="LocomotionStart" locomotion_status="{locomotion_status}"/>
                                    </Delay>
                                </Sequence>
                            </Fallback>
                        </RetryUntilSuccesful>
                        <ForceFailure>
                            <Action ID="ReplanningRequestLevel1" ltl_state_current="{ltl_state_current}" ltl_state_executed_sequence="{ltl_state_executed_sequence}" replanning_request="{replanning_request}"/>
                        </ForceFailure>
                    </Fallback>
                    <Fallback>
                        <Switch3 case_1="move" case_2="stay" case_3="synchronized_transition" variable="{bt_action_type}">
                            <Action ID="MoveAction" bt_action_type="{bt_action_type}" current_action="{current_action}" goal_sent="{goal_sent}" move_base_finished="{move_base_finished}" move_base_idle="{move_base_idle}"/>
                            <Action ID="StayAction" bt_action_type="{bt_action_type}" current_action="{current_action}" ltl_state_current="{ltl_state_current}"/>
                            <Action ID="SynchronizedTransitionAction" bt_action_type="{bt_action_type}" current_action="{current_action}" ltl_state_current="{ltl_state_current}"/>
                            <AlwaysFailure/>
                        </Switch3>
                        <ForceFailure>
                            <Action ID="ReplanningRequestLevel3" ltl_state_current="{ltl_state_current}" ltl_state_executed_sequence="{ltl_state_executed_sequence}" replanning_request="{replanning_request}"/>
                        </ForceFailure>
                    </Fallback>
                </ReactiveSequence>
                <Action ID="UpdateLTL" action_sequence="{action_sequence}" action_sequence_executed="{action_sequence_executed}" bt_action_type="{bt_action_type}" current_action="{current_action}" ltl_state_desired_sequence="{ltl_state_desired_sequence}"/>
            </Sequence>
        </Repeat>
    </BehaviorTree>
    <!-- ////////// -->
    <TreeNodesModel>
        <Action ID="LTLPreCheck">
            <input_port name="ltl_state_current"/>
            <input_port name="ltl_state_desired_sequence"/>
            <inout_port name="ltl_state_executed_sequence"/>
        </Action>
        <Action ID="LocomotionStart">
            <input_port name="locomotion_status"/>
        </Action>
        <Action ID="LocomotionStatusCheck">
            <input_port name="locomotion_status"/>
        </Action>
        <Action ID="MoveAction">
            <input_port name="bt_action_type"/>
            <input_port name="current_action"/>
            <output_port name="goal_sent"/>
            <input_port name="move_base_finished"/>
            <input_port name="move_base_idle"/>
        </Action>
        <Action ID="RecoveryStand">
            <input_port name="locomotion_status"/>
        </Action>
        <Action ID="ReplanningRequestLevel1">
            <input_port name="ltl_state_current"/>
            <inout_port name="ltl_state_executed_sequence"/>
            <inout_port name="replanning_request"/>
        </Action>
        <Action ID="ReplanningRequestLevel2">
            <input_port name="ltl_state_current"/>
            <inout_port name="ltl_state_executed_sequence"/>
            <inout_port name="replanning_request"/>
        </Action>
        <Action ID="ReplanningRequestLevel3">
            <input_port name="ltl_state_current"/>
            <inout_port name="ltl_state_executed_sequence"/>
            <inout_port name="replanning_request"/>
        </Action>
        <Action ID="StayAction">
            <input_port name="bt_action_type"/>
            <input_port name="current_action"/>
            <inout_port name="ltl_state_current"/>
        </Action>
        <Action ID="SynchronizedTransitionAction">
            <input_port name="bt_action_type"/>
            <input_port name="current_action"/>
            <inout_port name="ltl_state_current"/>
        </Action>
        <Action ID="UpdateLTL">
            <inout_port name="action_sequence"/>
            <inout_port name="action_sequence_executed"/>
            <output_port name="bt_action_type"/>
            <output_port name="current_action"/>
            <inout_port name="ltl_state_desired_sequence"/>
        </Action>
    </TreeNodesModel>
    <!-- ////////// -->
</root>

<root main_tree_to_execute="BehaviorTree">
    <!-- ////////// -->
    <BehaviorTree ID="BehaviorTree">
        <Repeat num_cycles="{num_cycles}">
            <Sequence>
                <Fallback>
                    <Condition ID="LTLPreCheck" ltl_state_current="{ltl_state_current}" ltl_state_desired_sequence="{ltl_state_desired_sequence}" ltl_state_executed_sequence="{ltl_state_executed_sequence}"/>
                    <ForceFailure>
                        <Action ID="ReplanningRequestLevel2" ltl_state_current="{ltl_state_current}" ltl_state_executed_sequence="{ltl_state_executed_sequence}" replanning_request="{replanning_request}"/>
                    </ForceFailure>
                </Fallback>
                <ReactiveSequence>
                    <Fallback>
                        <Condition ID="ReactiveLTLStateCheck" ltl_state_current="{ltl_state_current}" ltl_state_desired_sequence="{ltl_state_desired_sequence}"/>
                        <ForceFailure>
                            <Action ID="ReplanningRequestLevel2" ltl_state_current="{ltl_state_current}" ltl_state_executed_sequence="{ltl_state_executed_sequence}" replanning_request="{replanning_request}"/>
                        </ForceFailure>
                    </Fallback>
                    <Fallback>
                        <Switch4 case_1="move" case_2="stay" case_3="start_training" case_4="terminate_training" variable="{bt_action_type}">
                            <Action ID="MoveAction" bt_action_type="{bt_action_type}" current_action="{current_action}" goal_sent="{goal_sent}" move_base_finished="{move_base_finished}" move_base_idle="{move_base_idle}"/>
                            <Action ID="StayAction" bt_action_type="{bt_action_type}" current_action="{current_action}" ltl_state_current="{ltl_state_current}"/>
                            <Action ID="GuideAction" bt_action_type="{bt_action_type}" current_action="{current_action}" ltl_state_current="{ltl_state_current}"/>
                            <Action ID="BackNormalAction" bt_action_type="{bt_action_type}" current_action="{current_action}" ltl_state_current="{ltl_state_current}"/>
                            <AlwaysFailure/>
                        </Switch4>
                        <ForceFailure>
                            <Action ID="ReplanningRequestLevel3" ltl_state_current="{ltl_state_current}" ltl_state_executed_sequence="{ltl_state_executed_sequence}" replanning_request="{replanning_request}"/>
                        </ForceFailure>
                    </Fallback>
                </ReactiveSequence>
                <Action ID="UpdateLTL" action_sequence="{action_sequence}" action_sequence_executed="{action_sequence_executed}" bt_action_type="{bt_action_type}" current_action="{current_action}" ltl_state_desired_sequence="{ltl_state_desired_sequence}"/>
            </Sequence>
        </Repeat>
    </BehaviorTree>
    <!-- ////////// -->
    <TreeNodesModel>
        <Action ID="BackNormalAction">
            <input_port name="bt_action_type"/>
            <input_port name="current_action"/>
            <inout_port name="ltl_state_current"/>
        </Action>
        <Action ID="DropAction">
            <input_port name="bt_action_type"/>
            <input_port name="current_action"/>
            <inout_port name="ltl_state_current"/>
        </Action>
        <Action ID="GuideAction">
            <input_port name="bt_action_type"/>
            <input_port name="current_action"/>
            <inout_port name="ltl_state_current"/>
        </Action>
        <Condition ID="LTLPreCheck">
            <input_port name="ltl_state_current"/>
            <input_port name="ltl_state_desired_sequence"/>
            <inout_port name="ltl_state_executed_sequence"/>
        </Condition>
        <Action ID="LocomotionStart">
            <input_port name="locomotion_status"/>
        </Action>
        <Condition ID="LocomotionStatusCheck">
            <input_port name="locomotion_status"/>
        </Condition>
        <Action ID="MoveAction">
            <input_port name="bt_action_type"/>
            <input_port name="current_action"/>
            <output_port name="goal_sent"/>
            <input_port name="move_base_finished"/>
            <input_port name="move_base_idle"/>
        </Action>
        <Action ID="PickAction">
            <input_port name="bt_action_type"/>
            <input_port name="current_action"/>
            <inout_port name="ltl_state_current"/>
        </Action>
        <Condition ID="ReactiveLTLStateCheck">
            <input_port name="ltl_state_current"/>
            <input_port name="ltl_state_desired_sequence"/>
        </Condition>
        <Action ID="RecoveryStand">
            <input_port name="locomotion_status"/>
        </Action>
        <Action ID="ReplanningRequestLevel1">
            <input_port name="ltl_state_current"/>
            <inout_port name="ltl_state_executed_sequence"/>
            <inout_port name="replanning_request"/>
        </Action>
        <Action ID="ReplanningRequestLevel2">
            <input_port name="ltl_state_current"/>
            <inout_port name="ltl_state_executed_sequence"/>
            <inout_port name="replanning_request"/>
        </Action>
        <Action ID="ReplanningRequestLevel3">
            <input_port name="ltl_state_current"/>
            <inout_port name="ltl_state_executed_sequence"/>
            <inout_port name="replanning_request"/>
        </Action>
        <Action ID="StayAction">
            <input_port name="bt_action_type"/>
            <input_port name="current_action"/>
            <inout_port name="ltl_state_current"/>
        </Action>
        <Action ID="SynchronizedTransitionAction">
            <input_port name="bt_action_type"/>
            <input_port name="current_action"/>
            <inout_port name="ltl_state_current"/>
        </Action>
        <Action ID="UpdateLTL">
            <inout_port name="action_sequence"/>
            <inout_port name="action_sequence_executed"/>
            <output_port name="bt_action_type"/>
            <output_port name="current_action"/>
            <inout_port name="ltl_state_desired_sequence"/>
        </Action>
    </TreeNodesModel>
    <!-- ////////// -->
</root>

<!--
  This Behavior Tree follows a dynamic pose to a certain distance
-->

<root main_tree_to_execute="MainTree">
  <BehaviorTree ID="MainTree">
    <PipelineSequence name="NavigateWithReplanning">
      <RateController hz="1.0">
        <Sequence>
          <GoalUpdater input_goal="{goal}" output_goal="{updated_goal}">
            <ComputePathToPose goal="{updated_goal}" path="{path}" planner_id="GridBased"/>
          </GoalUpdater>
         <TruncatePath distance="1.0" input_path="{path}" output_path="{truncated_path}"/>
        </Sequence>
      </RateController>
      <KeepRunningUntilFailure>
        <FollowPath path="{truncated_path}" controller_id="FollowPath"/>
      </KeepRunningUntilFailure>
    </PipelineSequence>
  </BehaviorTree>
</root>

<!--
  This Behavior Tree replans the global path periodically at 1 Hz.
-->
<root main_tree_to_execute="MainTree">
  <BehaviorTree ID="MainTree">
    <RecoveryNode number_of_retries="6" name="NavigateRecovery">
      <PipelineSequence name="NavigateWithReplanning">
        <RateController hz="0.1">
          <RecoveryNode number_of_retries="1" name="ComputePathToPose">
            <ComputePathToPose goal="{goal}" path="{path}" planner_id="GridBased"/>
            <ClearEntireCostmap name="ClearGlobalCostmap-Context" service_name="global_costmap/clear_entirely_global_costmap"/>
          </RecoveryNode>
        </RateController>
        <RecoveryNode number_of_retries="100" name="FollowPath">
          <FollowPath path="{path}" controller_id="FollowPath"/>
          <ClearEntireCostmap name="ClearLocalCostmap-Context" service_name="local_costmap/clear_entirely_local_costmap"/>
        </RecoveryNode>
      </PipelineSequence>
      <ReactiveFallback name="RecoveryFallback">
        <GoalUpdated/>
        <SequenceStar name="RecoveryActions">
          <ClearEntireCostmap name="ClearLocalCostmap-Subtree" service_name="local_costmap/clear_entirely_local_costmap"/>
          <ClearEntireCostmap name="ClearGlobalCostmap-Subtree" service_name="global_costmap/clear_entirely_global_costmap"/>
        </SequenceStar>
      </ReactiveFallback>
    </RecoveryNode>
  </BehaviorTree>
</root>

<!--
  This Behavior Tree replans the global path periodically at 1 Hz and it also has
  recovery actions.
-->
<root main_tree_to_execute="MainTree">
  <BehaviorTree ID="MainTree">
    <RecoveryNode number_of_retries="2" name="NavigateRecovery">
      <PipelineSequence name="NavigateWithReplanning">
        <RateController hz="1.0">
          <RecoveryNode number_of_retries="4" name="ComputePathToPose">
            <ComputePathToPose goal="{goal}" path="{path}" planner_id="GridBased"/>
            <ReactiveFallback name="PathToPoseFallback">
              <GoalUpdated/>
              <RoundRobin name="GlobalPlannerRecoveryActions">
                <ClearEntireCostmap name="ClearGlobalCostmap-Context" service_name="global_costmap/clear_entirely_global_costmap"/>
                <Wait wait_duration="2"/>
              </RoundRobin>
            </ReactiveFallback>
          </RecoveryNode>
        </RateController>
        <RecoveryNode number_of_retries="4" name="FollowPath">
          <FollowPath path="{path}" controller_id="FollowPath"/>
          <ReactiveFallback name="FollowPathFallback">
            <GoalUpdated/>
            <RoundRobin name="PlannerRecoveryActions">
              <ClearEntireCostmap name="ClearLocalCostmap-Context" service_name="local_costmap/clear_entirely_local_costmap"/>
              <Spin spin_dist="1.57"/>
            </RoundRobin>
          </ReactiveFallback>
        </RecoveryNode>
      </PipelineSequence>
      <ReactiveFallback name="RecoveryFallback">
        <GoalUpdated/>
        <Wait wait_duration="5"/>
      </ReactiveFallback>
    </RecoveryNode>
  </BehaviorTree>
</root>

<root main_tree_to_execute="BehaviorTree">
    <!-- ////////// -->
    <BehaviorTree ID="BehaviorTree">
        <Sequence name="Sequence1">
            <Action ID="go1"/>
            <Sequence name="Sequence2">
                <Action ID="go2"/>
                <ForceSuccess>
                    <Action ID="go3"/>
                </ForceSuccess>
                <Action ID="go4"/>
                <Action ID="go5"/>
                <Action ID="go6"/>
            </Sequence>
            <Action ID="go7"/>
            <Action ID="go8"/>
        </Sequence>
    </BehaviorTree>
    <!-- ////////// -->
    <TreeNodesModel>
        <Action ID="go1"/>
        <Action ID="go2"/>
        <Action ID="go3"/>
        <Action ID="go4"/>
        <Action ID="go5"/>
        <Action ID="go6"/>
        <Action ID="go7"/>
        <Action ID="go8"/>
    </TreeNodesModel>
    <!-- ////////// -->
</root>
