<root main_tree_to_execute="BehaviorTree">

    <BehaviorTree ID="BehaviorTree">
        <Sequence>
            <GetArmJointsForPose pose="UPTRAY" joints_pose="{joints_pose}" />
            <Parallel success_threshold="2" failure_threshold="2">
                <SetArmJointsLeft joints_pose="{joints_pose}" />
                <SetArmJointsRight joints_pose="{joints_pose}" />
            </Parallel>
            <GetArmJointsForPose pose="EXTENDED" joints_pose="{joints_pose}" />
            <Parallel success_threshold="2" failure_threshold="2">
                <SetArmJointsLeft joints_pose="{joints_pose}" />
                <SetArmJointsRight joints_pose="{joints_pose}" />
            </Parallel>
            <GetArmJointsForPose pose="GRIPPING" joints_pose="{joints_pose}" />
            <Parallel success_threshold="2" failure_threshold="2">
                <SetArmJointsLeft joints_pose="{joints_pose}" />
                <SetArmJointsRight joints_pose="{joints_pose}" />
            </Parallel>
            <GetArmJointsForPose pose="REST" joints_pose="{joints_pose}" />
            <Parallel success_threshold="2" failure_threshold="2">
                <SetArmJointsLeft joints_pose="{joints_pose}" />
                <SetArmJointsRight joints_pose="{joints_pose}" />
            </Parallel>
        </Sequence>
    </BehaviorTree>

</root>

<root main_tree_to_execute="BehaviorTree">

        <Sequence>
            <Parallel success_threshold="2" failure_threshold="2">
                <GripperControlRight relative_gripper_gap="1.0" />
                <GripperControlLeft relative_gripper_gap="1.0" />
            </Parallel>
            <Parallel success_threshold="2" failure_threshold="2">
                <GripperControlRight relative_gripper_gap="0.0" />
                <GripperControlLeft relative_gripper_gap="0.0" />
            </Parallel>
        </Sequence>
    </BehaviorTree>
</root>

          <RecoveryNode number_of_retries="1" name="ComputePathToPose">
            <ComputePathToPose goal="{goal}" path="{path}" planner_id="GridBased"/>
            <ClearEntireCostmap name="ClearGlobalCostmap-Context" service_name="global_costmap/clear_entirely_global_costmap"/>
          </RecoveryNode>
        </RateController>
        <RecoveryNode number_of_retries="1" name="FollowPath">
          <FollowPath path="{path}" controller_id="FollowPath"/>
          <ClearEntireCostmap name="ClearLocalCostmap-Context" service_name="local_costmap/clear_entirely_local_costmap"/>
        </RecoveryNode>
      </PipelineSequence>
      <ReactiveFallback name="RecoveryFallback">
        <GoalUpdated/>
        <SequenceStar name="RecoveryActions">
          <ClearEntireCostmap name="ClearLocalCostmap-Subtree" service_name="local_costmap/clear_entirely_local_costmap"/>
          <ClearEntireCostmap name="ClearGlobalCostmap-Subtree" service_name="global_costmap/clear_entirely_global_costmap"/>
          <Spin spin_dist="1.57"/>
          <Wait wait_duration="5"/>
        </SequenceStar>
      </ReactiveFallback>
    </RecoveryNode>
  </BehaviorTree>
</root>

      <SequenceStar name="doSelfLocalization">

          <globalLocalizationServiceRequest/>
        </RetryUntilSuccesful>
        <RetryUntilSuccesful num_attempts="10" name="retry_localization">
          <Sequence>
            <Fallback>
              <IsLocalized/>
              <SequenceStar>
               <Spin/>
               <BackUp/>
               <Spin/>
             </SequenceStar>
            </Fallback>
            <IsLocalized/>
          </Sequence> 
        </RetryUntilSuccesful>
      </SequenceStar>
    </FallbackStar>
  </BehaviorTree>
</root>

<?xml version="1.0"?>
<root main_tree_to_execute="BehaviorTree">
    <!-- ////////// -->
    <BehaviorTree ID="BehaviorTree">
        <Fallback name="Core_seq">
            <Sequence name="">
                <Condition ID="checkMissionWait"/>
                <Action ID="stop"/>
            </Sequence>
            <Sequence>
                <Sequence name="init">
                    <Condition ID="checkExistPathGlobal"/>
                    <Fallback name="">
                        <Sequence name="">
                            <Condition ID="checkStateLaneKeeping"/>
                            <Condition ID="checkFailLaneChange"/>
                            <Action ID="callPathGlobal"/>
                        </Sequence>
                        <AlwaysSuccess/>
                    </Fallback>
                    <Action ID="init"/>
                    <Sequence name="gen path">
                        <Fallback name="StateSelect">
                            <Sequence name="LaneKeeping">
                                <Condition ID="checkStateLaneKeeping"/>
                                <Action ID="genPathLaneKeeping"/>
                                <Sequence name="LaneKeeping">
                                    <Fallback name="">
                                        <Sequence name="">
                                            <Condition ID="checkGlobalLaneChange"/>
                                            <Fallback name="">
                                                <Sequence name="">
                                                    <Condition ID="checkLeftChange"/>
                                                    <Fallback name="">
                                                        <Sequence name="">
                                                            <Condition ID="checkLaneChangeableLeft"/>
                                                            <Action ID="genPathLaneChangeLeft"/>
                                                            <Fallback name="">
                                                                <Sequence name="">
                                                                    <Fallback name="">
                                                                        <Condition ID="checkObjectStaticLeftLane"/>
                                                                        <Condition ID="checkCollisionBehindLeft"/>
                                                                    </Fallback>
                                                                    <Action ID="setStateLaneKeeping"/>
                                                                </Sequence>
                                                                <Action ID="setStateLaneChangeLeft"/>
                                                            </Fallback>
                                                        </Sequence>
                                                        <Action ID="setStateLaneKeeping"/>
                                                    </Fallback>
                                                </Sequence>
                                                <Sequence name="">
                                                    <Condition ID="checkLaneChangeableRight"/>
                                                    <Action ID="genPathLaneChangeRight"/>
                                                    <Fallback name="">
                                                        <Sequence name="">
                                                            <Fallback name="">
                                                                <Condition ID="checkObjectStaticRightLane"/>
                                                                <Condition ID="checkCollisionBehindRight"/>
                                                            </Fallback>
                                                            <Action ID="setStateLaneKeeping"/>
                                                        </Sequence>
                                                        <Action ID="setStateLaneChangeRight"/>
                                                    </Fallback>
                                                </Sequence>
                                                <Action ID="setStateLaneKeeping"/>
                                            </Fallback>
                                        </Sequence>
                                        <Sequence name="check Collision">
                                            <Condition ID="checkFrontObject"/>
                                            <Fallback name="">
                                                <Sequence name="lane_keeping">
                                                    <Inverter>
                                                        <Condition ID="checkIrregularFront"/>
                                                    </Inverter>
                                                    <Fallback name="lane_keeping">
                                                        <Condition ID="checkNearCorner"/>
                                                        <Condition ID="checkObjectNearGoal"/>
                                                        <Condition ID="checkMeNearGoal"/>
                                                    </Fallback>
                                                    <Action ID="setStateLaneKeeping"/>
                                                </Sequence>
                                                <Fallback name="lane_change">
                                                    <Sequence>
                                                        <Condition ID="checkProfitLaneChangeLeft"/>
                                                        <Fallback>
                                                            <Sequence name="">
                                                                <Fallback>
                                                                    <Condition ID="checkObjectStaticLeftLane"/>
                                                                    <Condition ID="checkIrregularLeft"/>
                                                                </Fallback>
                                                                <Action ID="setStateLaneKeeping"/>
                                                            </Sequence>
                                                            <Sequence name="">
                                                                <Condition ID="checkLaneChangeableLeft"/>
                                                                <Action ID="genPathLaneChangeLeft"/>
                                                                <Fallback name="">
                                                                    <Sequence name="">
                                                                        <Fallback name="">
                                                                            <Condition ID="checkObjectStaticLeftLane"/>
                                                                            <Condition ID="checkCollisionBehindLeft"/>
                                                                        </Fallback>
                                                                        <Action ID="setStateLaneKeeping"/>
                                                                    </Sequence>
                                                                    <Action ID="setStateLaneChangeLeft"/>
                                                                </Fallback>
                                                            </Sequence>
                                                            <Action ID="setStateLaneKeeping"/>
                                                        </Fallback>
                                                    </Sequence>
                                                    <Sequence>
                                                        <Condition ID="checkProfitLaneChangeRight"/>
                                                        <Fallback>
                                                            <Sequence>
                                                                <Fallback>
                                                                    <Condition ID="checkObjectStaticRightLane" name="checkObjectStaticRigtLane"/>
                                                                    <Condition ID="checkIrregularRight"/>
                                                                </Fallback>
                                                                <Action ID="setStateLaneKeeping"/>
                                                            </Sequence>
                                                            <Sequence>
                                                                <Condition ID="checkLaneChangeableRight"/>
                                                                <Action ID="genPathLaneChangeRight"/>
                                                                <Fallback name="">
                                                                    <Sequence name="">
                                                                        <Fallback name="">
                                                                            <Condition ID="checkObjectStaticRightLane"/>
                                                                            <Condition ID="checkCollisionBehindRight"/>
                                                                        </Fallback>
                                                                        <Action ID="setStateLaneKeeping"/>
                                                                    </Sequence>
                                                                    <Action ID="setStateLaneChangeRight"/>
                                                                </Fallback>
                                                            </Sequence>
                                                            <Action ID="setStateLaneKeeping"/>
                                                        </Fallback>
                                                    </Sequence>
                                                </Fallback>
                                            </Fallback>
                                        </Sequence>
                                        <Action ID="setStateLaneKeeping"/>
                                    </Fallback>
                                    <Fallback name="">
                                        <Condition ID="checkMustLaneChange"/>
                                        <AlwaysSuccess/>
                                    </Fallback>
                                </Sequence>
                            </Sequence>
                            <Sequence name="LaneChangeLeft">
                                <Condition ID="checkStateLaneChangeLeft"/>
                                <Fallback name="">
                                    <Sequence name="">
                                        <Condition ID="checkEndLaneChange"/>
                                        <Action ID="setStateLaneKeeping"/>
                                        <Action ID="callPathGlobal"/>
                                    </Sequence>
                                    <Action ID="speedProfileLaneChange"/>
                                </Fallback>
                            </Sequence>
                            <Sequence name="LaneChangeRigth">
                                <Condition ID="checkStateLaneChangeRight"/>
                                <Fallback name="">
                                    <Sequence name="">
                                        <Condition ID="checkEndLaneChange"/>
                                        <Action ID="setStateLaneKeeping"/>
                                        <Action ID="callPathGlobal"/>
                                    </Sequence>
                                    <Action ID="speedProfileLaneChange"/>
                                </Fallback>
                            </Sequence>
                            <Sequence name="Recovery">
                                <Action ID="setStateLaneKeeping"/>
                            </Sequence>
                        </Fallback>
                        <Fallback name="traffic check">
                            <Condition ID="checkPassAbleTrafficLight"/>
                            <Action ID="stopTrafficLight"/>
                        </Fallback>
                        <Fallback name="unprotectedTurn">
                            <Sequence>
                                <Condition ID="checkUnprotected"/>
                                <Condition ID="checkImpassalbeUnprotected"/>
                                <Action ID="stop"/>
                            </Sequence>
                            <AlwaysSuccess/>
                        </Fallback>
                    </Sequence>
                </Sequence>
                <Action ID="setPath"/>
                <Action ID="publishData"/>
                <Fallback name="mission state">
                    <Sequence>
                        <Condition ID="checkArriveGoal"/>
                        <Action ID="setStateMissionArrive"/>
                        <Action ID="publishStateMission"/>
                    </Sequence>
                    <Sequence>
                        <Action ID="setStateMissionGoing"/>
                    </Sequence>
                </Fallback>
            </Sequence>
        </Fallback>
    </BehaviorTree>
    <!-- ////////// -->
    <TreeNodesModel>
        <Action ID="acc"/>
        <Action ID="callPathGlobal"/>
        <Action ID="callPathGlobalLeft"/>
        <Action ID="callPathGlobalRight"/>
        <Condition ID="checkAbleAstar"/>
        <Condition ID="checkArriveGoal"/>
        <Condition ID="checkCollision"/>
        <Condition ID="checkCollisionBehindLeft"/>
        <Condition ID="checkCollisionBehindRight"/>
        <Condition ID="checkEndLaneChange"/>
        <Condition ID="checkExistPathGlobal"/>
        <Condition ID="checkFailLaneChange"/>
        <Condition ID="checkFrontObject"/>
        <Condition ID="checkGlobalLaneChange"/>
        <Condition ID="checkImpassalbeUnprotected"/>
        <Condition ID="checkIrregularFront"/>
        <Condition ID="checkIrregularLeft"/>
        <Condition ID="checkIrregularRight"/>
        <Condition ID="checkLaneChange"/>
        <Condition ID="checkLaneChangeableLeft"/>
        <Condition ID="checkLaneChangeableRight"/>
        <Condition ID="checkLeftChange"/>
        <Condition ID="checkMeNearGoal"/>
        <Condition ID="checkMissionWait"/>
        <Condition ID="checkMustLaneChange"/>
        <Condition ID="checkNearCorner"/>
        <Condition ID="checkNearStopline"/>
        <Condition ID="checkObjectNearGoal"/>
        <Condition ID="checkObjectStaticLeftLane"/>
        <Condition ID="checkObjectStaticRightLane"/>
        <Condition ID="checkPassAbleTrafficLight"/>
        <Condition ID="checkProfitLaneChangeLeft"/>
        <Condition ID="checkProfitLaneChangeRight"/>
        <Condition ID="checkStateLaneChangeLeft"/>
        <Condition ID="checkStateLaneChangeRight"/>
        <Condition ID="checkStateLaneKeeping"/>
        <Condition ID="checkUnprotected"/>
        <Action ID="genPathLaneChangeLeft"/>
        <Action ID="genPathLaneChangeRight"/>
        <Action ID="genPathLaneKeeping"/>
        <Action ID="init"/>
        <Action ID="laneChangeLeft"/>
        <Action ID="laneChangeRight"/>
        <Action ID="publishData"/>
        <Action ID="publishStateMission"/>
        <Action ID="setPath"/>
        <Action ID="setStateLaneChangeLeft"/>
        <Action ID="setStateLaneChangeRight"/>
        <Action ID="setStateLaneKeeping"/>
        <Action ID="setStateMissionArrive"/>
        <Action ID="setStateMissionGoing"/>
        <Action ID="speedProfileLaneChange"/>
        <Action ID="stop"/>
        <Action ID="stopTrafficLight"/>
    </TreeNodesModel>
    <!-- ////////// -->
</root>

        <Action ID="ComputeInvPose"/>

        <Action ID="FollowHuman"/>

        <Action ID="GraspBottle"/>
        <Condition ID="InvPoseComputed"/>
        <Condition ID="InvPoseValid"/>
        <Action ID="KeepArmsForGrasp"/>

        <Condition ID="RobotAtInvPose"/>
        <Condition ID="RobotInRoom"/>
        <Condition ID="RoomKnown"/>
        <Action ID="SetInvPoseInvaild"/>
    </TreeNodesModel>

</root>

<!--
  This Behavior Tree replans the global path periodically at 1 Hz and it also has
  recovery actions.
-->

<root main_tree_to_execute="MainTree">
  <BehaviorTree ID="MainTree">
    <RestoreConfig name="Restore_footprint_publisher" node_name="/footprint_publisher">
    <RestoreConfig name="Restore_global_costmap" node_name="/global_costmap/global_costmap">
      <Sequence>
	<!-- initialize blackboard -->
	<SetBlackboard output_key="current_side" value="center"/>
	<SetBlackboard output_key="config_changed" value="false"/>

	<!-- use center for normal, 0.5 makes transition sudden, but small number cause issue
             passing close to obstacles -->
	<ChangeParam node_name="/global_costmap/global_costmap"
		     param_name="navcog_path_layer.walk_weight"
		     param_value="[0.1, 0.0, 0.1]"  name="ChangeParamToCenter"/>

	<ChangeParam node_name="/global_costmap/global_costmap"
		     param_name="navcog_path_layer.path_adjusted_center"
		     param_value="-0.5"  name="ChangeParamPathAdjustedCenter1"/>
	
	<ChangeParam node_name="/planner_server"
		     param_name="NavCog.path_adjusted_center"
		     param_value="-0.5"  name="ChangeParamPathAdjustedCenter2"/>
	
	<!-- default footprint is smallest, so change the footprint to normal -->
	<ChangeParam node_name="/footprint_publisher"
		     param_name="footprint_mode"
		     param_value="0"  name="ChangeParamToNormal"/>

	<!-- compute a path -->
	<RecoveryNode number_of_retries="999999999" name="InitialComputePathRepeat">
	  <Sequence name="ComputePathSequence">
	    <!-- clear costmap -->
	    <ClearEntireCostmap name="ClearGlobalCostmap-context" server_timeout="5000"
				service_name="/global_costmap/clear_entirely_global_costmap"/>
	    
	    <WaitFloat wait_duration_float="0.5"/>
	    <CurrentPose global_frame="map" robot_base_frame="base_footprint" pose="{current_pose}" />
	    <ComputePathToPose start="{current_pose}" goal="{goal}" path="{navcog_path}" planner_id="NavCog"/>
	    <PathToPoses path="{navcog_path}" goals="{navcog_goals}" />
	    <PublishTopicPath topic="path_out" value="{navcog_path}"/> <!-- for debug -->
	    <!-- wait long enough to include neighbor obstacles -->
	    <WaitFloat wait_duration_float="0.5"/>
	    <ComputePathThroughPoses goals="{navcog_goals}" path="{path}" planner_id="GridBased"/>
	    <!-- do not remove this plan topic, this is used by ROS1 node -->
	    <PublishTopicPath topic="plan" value="{path}"/>
	    <!-- front vibration -->
	    <PublishTopic topic="/cabot/event" value="navigation;event;navigation_start" />
	  </Sequence>
	  <ForceSuccess>
	    <WaitFloat wait_duration_float="0.5"/>
	  </ForceSuccess>
	</RecoveryNode>

	<!-- main loop -->
	<RecoveryNode number_of_retries="999999999" name="NavigateRecovery">
	  <!-- navigation -->
	  <PipelineSequence name="NavigateWithReplanning">

	    <!-- Check people status frequently -->
	    <RateController hz="2" name="AvoidPeople">
              <Fallback name="AvoidPersonFallback">
		<Sequence>
		  <!-- check if there is someone detecgted -->
		  <PeopleExist people_topic="people" people_out="{people}" />
		  <PeopleStops people="{people}" threshold="0.2" duration="2.0"/>
		  <!-- find people needs to be avoided based on there walking speed and walking direction -->
		  <NeedToAvoid people="{people}" robot_frame="base_footprint" path="{path}" avoid="{avoid}" avoid_count="{avoid_count}"/>

		  <!-- replaced with NeedToAvoid
		       <SomeoneOnPath path="{path}" people="{people}" person_out="{person}" range="0.5"/>
		      <FarEnough odom_topic="odom" max_acc="0.3" delay="0.2" min_threshold="0" max_threshold="7.0"
		      global_frame="map_global" robot_frame="base_footprint" person="{person}"/>
		  -->

		  <!-- let the costmap know who should be removed, who should not be removed -->
		  <IgnorePeople people="{avoid}" ignore_topic="ignore" wait_duration="0.5"/>

		  <CurrentPose global_frame="map" robot_base_frame="base_footprint" pose="{current_pose}" />
		  <ComputePathToPose start="{current_pose}" goal="{goal}" path="{navcog_path}" planner_id="NavCog"/>
		  <PathToPoses path="{navcog_path}" goals="{navcog_goals}" />
		  <PublishTopicPath topic="path_out" value="{navcog_path}"/> <!-- debug -->
		  <ComputePathThroughPoses goals="{navcog_goals}" path="{path}" planner_id="GridBased"/>
		  <!-- do not remove this plan topic, this is used by ROS1 node -->
		  <PublishTopicPath topic="plan" value="{path}"/>

		  <IfThenElse>
		    <BlackboardCheckInt value_A="{avoid_count}" value_B="1" return_on_mismatch="FAILURE">
		      <AlwaysSuccess/>
		    </BlackboardCheckInt>
		    <PublishTopic topic="/cabot/event" value="navigation;event;bt_navigator_avoid_person" />
		    <PublishTopic topic="/cabot/event" value="navigation;event;bt_navigator_avoid_people" />
		  </IfThenElse>
		  
		  <Wait wait_duration="5.0"/>
		  <!-- replaced with CanPassPerson, which publish path for navigation
		      <ComputePathToPose goal="{goal}" path="{path}" planner_id="GridBased"/>
		  -->
		</Sequence>
		<AlwaysSuccess/>
	      </Fallback>
	    </RateController>>

	    <!-- follow path -->
	    <ReactiveFallback>
	      <!-- if the goal is updated, abort following first, this will be recorvered by RecoveryComputePathRepeat -->
	      <GoalUpdated/>
	      <FollowPath path="{path}" controller_id="FollowPath" goal_checker_id="cabot_goal_checker"/>
	    </ReactiveFallback>
	  </PipelineSequence>

	  <!-- if follow path is aborted, compute path and try again -->
	  <RecoveryNode number_of_retries="999999999" name="RecoveryComputePathRepeat">
	    <Sequence name="ComputePathSequence">
	      <!-- clear costmap -->
	      <ClearCostmapAroundRobot name="ClearGlobalCostmapAroundRobot2" server_timeout="5000"
				       service_name="global_costmap/clear_around_global_costmap"
				       reset_distance="20" />
	      <ClearCostmapAroundRobot name="ClearLocalCostmapAroundRobot" server_timeout="5000"
				       service_name="local_costmap/clear_around_local_costmap"
				       reset_distance="20" />
	      
	      <!-- wait long enough to include neighbor obstacles -->
	      <Wait wait_duration="1.0"/>
	      <!-- do not reroute 
	      <ComputePathToPose goal="{goal}" path="{path}" planner_id="GridBased"/>
	      <CheckPath  path="{path_temp}" path_topic="/path" plan_topic="/plan" path_out="{path}" />
	      -->
	    </Sequence>
	    <AlwaysSuccess/>
	  </RecoveryNode>
	</RecoveryNode>
      </Sequence>
    </RestoreConfig>
    </RestoreConfig>
  </BehaviorTree>
</root>

<root main_tree_to_execute = "MainTree">
    <BehaviorTree ID="MainTree">
        <Sequence>
            <SetBlackboard output_key="Goal_a" value="1.17;-1.65;30" />
            <SetBlackboard output_key="Goal_b" value="1.1;1.51;90" />
            <SetBlackboard output_key="Goal_c" value="-1.25;0.324;0" />
            <SetBlackboard output_key="Waiting_time" value="2"/>
            <Fallback>
                <ReactiveSequence>
                    <InterruptEvent event="gohome"/>
                    <Repeat num_cycles="-1">
                        <Sequence>
                            <SubTree ID="MoveRobot" target="Goal_a" />
                            <WaitingEvent name="waiting_event" waiting_time="{Waiting_time}"/>
                            <SubTree ID="MoveRobot" target="Goal_b" />
                            <WaitingEvent name="waiting_event" waiting_time="{Waiting_time}"/>
                        </Sequence>
                    </Repeat>
                </ReactiveSequence>
                <Sequence>
                    <SubTree ID="MoveRobot" target="Goal_c" />
                </Sequence>
            </Fallback>
        </Sequence>
    </BehaviorTree>

    <BehaviorTree ID="MoveRobot">
        <Sequence name="SetGoal">
            <MoveBase goal="{target}" />
        </Sequence>
    </BehaviorTree>
</root>

<!--
  This Behavior Tree replans the global path periodically at 1 Hz and it also has
  recovery actions.
-->
<root main_tree_to_execute="MainTree">
  <BehaviorTree ID="MainTree">
    <RecoveryNode number_of_retries="6" name="NavigateRecovery">
      <PipelineSequence name="NavigateWithReplanning">
        <RateController hz="1.0">
          <RecoveryNode number_of_retries="1" name="ComputePathToPose">
            <ComputePathToPose goal="{goal}" path="{path}" planner_id="GridBased"/>
            <ClearEntireCostmap name="ClearGlobalCostmap-Context" service_name="global_costmap/clear_entirely_global_costmap"/>
          </RecoveryNode>
        </RateController>
        <RecoveryNode number_of_retries="1" name="FollowPath">
          <FollowPath path="{path}" controller_id="FollowPath"/>
          <ClearEntireCostmap name="ClearLocalCostmap-Context" service_name="local_costmap/clear_entirely_local_costmap"/>
        </RecoveryNode>
      </PipelineSequence>
      <ReactiveFallback name="RecoveryFallback">
        <GoalUpdated/>
        <SequenceStar name="RecoveryActions">
          <ClearEntireCostmap name="ClearLocalCostmap-Subtree" service_name="local_costmap/clear_entirely_local_costmap"/>
          <ClearEntireCostmap name="ClearGlobalCostmap-Subtree" service_name="global_costmap/clear_entirely_global_costmap"/>
          <Spin spin_dist="1.57"/>
          <Wait wait_duration="5"/>
        </SequenceStar>
      </ReactiveFallback>
    </RecoveryNode>
  </BehaviorTree>
</root>

<!--
    This Behavior Tree replans the global path periodically at 1 Hz and it also has
    recovery actions.
-->

<root main_tree_to_execute="QueueTree">
  <BehaviorTree ID="QueueTree">
    <RestoreConfig node_name="/footprint_publisher">
      <RestoreConfig node_name="/controller_server">
	<RestoreConfig node_name="/global_costmap/global_costmap">
	  <Sequence>
	    <!-- set the footprint as small -->
	    <ChangeParam node_name="/footprint_publisher"
			 param_name="footprint_mode"
			 param_value="3"  name="ChangeParamFootprintToSmall"/>
	    
	    <ChangeParam node_name="/controller_server"
			 param_name="FollowPath.max_vel_x"
			 param_value="0.5"  name="ChangeParamSpeedDown"/>
	    
	    <ChangeParam node_name="/controller_server"
			 param_name="cabot_goal_checker.xy_goal_tolerance"
			 param_value="0.20"  name="ChangeParamFollowPathXyGoalTolerance"/>
	    <ChangeParam node_name="/controller_server"
			 param_name="cabot_goal_checker.yaw_goal_tolerance"
			 param_value="0.20"  name="ChangeParamFollowPathYawGoalTolerance"/>
	    
	    <ChangeParam node_name="/global_costmap/global_costmap"
			 param_name="navcog_path_layer.walk_weight"
			 param_value="[0.3, 0.0, 0.3] "  name="ChangeParamWalkWeightToCenter"/>
	    <!-- 1: use adjust mode to use actual center of the corridor based on costmap
		 0: use navcog path as the ceter of the corridor -->
	    <ChangeParam node_name="/global_costmap/global_costmap"
			 param_name="navcog_path_layer.path_mode"
			 param_value="0"  name="ChangeParamToAdjust"/>
	    <ChangeParam node_name="/global_costmap/global_costmap"
			 param_name="navcog_path_layer.path_adjusted_center"
			 param_value="0.0"  name="ChangeParamPathAdjustedCenter"/>
	    
	    <ChangeParam node_name="/global_costmap/global_costmap"
			 param_name="inflation_layer.inflation_radius"
			 param_value="0.2"  name="ChangeParamInflationRadius"/>
	    
	    <!-- compute a path -->
	    <RecoveryNode number_of_retries="999999999" name="InitialComputePathRepeat">
	      <Sequence name="ComputePathSequence">
		<!-- clear costmap -->
		<!--
		<ClearCostmapAroundRobot name="ClearCostmapAroundRobot" server_timeout="5000"
					 service_name="global_costmap/clear_around_global_costmap"
					 window_size_x="20" window_size_y="20"/>
		-->
		<ClearEntireCostmap name="ClearGlobalCostmap-context" server_timeout="5000"
				    service_name="global_costmap/clear_entirely_global_costmap"/>
		
		<!-- wait long enough to include neighbor obstacles -->
		<WaitFloat wait_duration_float="0.5"/>
		<ComputePathToPose goal="{goal}" path="{path_temp}" planner_id="GridBased"/>
		<CheckPath  path="{path_temp}" path_topic="/path" plan_topic="/plan" path_out="{path}" />
		<!-- front vibration -->
		<!--
		<PublishTopicInt8 topic="/cabot/notification" value="5" />
		-->
	      </Sequence>
	      <ForceSuccess>
		<WaitFloat wait_duration_float="0.5"/>
	      </ForceSuccess>
	    </RecoveryNode>
	    
	    <!-- main loop -->
	    <RecoveryNode number_of_retries="999999999" name="NavigateRecovery">
	      <!-- navigation -->
	      <PipelineSequence name="NavigateWithReplanning">
		<!-- Check people status frequently -->
		<!-- find people needs to be avoided not in queue -->
		<!--
		<RateController hz="2" name="AvoidPeople">
		  <Fallback name="AvoidPersonFallback">
		    <Sequence name="AvoidPerson">
		      <PeopleExist people_topic="people" people_out="{people}"/>
		      <NeedToAvoid people="{people}" robot_frame="base_footprint" path="{path}" avoid="{people_avoid}"/>
		      <SomeoneNotInQueue queue_topic="queue_people_py/queue" people="{people_avoid}" people_out_not_queue="{people_avoid_not_queue}"/>
		      <IgnorePeople people="{people_avoid_not_queue}" ignore_topic="ignore" wait_duration="0.5"/>
		      <ComputePathToPose goal="{goal}" path="{path_temp}" planner_id="GridBased"/>
		      <CheckPath current="{path}" path="{path_temp}" path_topic="/path" plan_topic="/plan" path_out="{path}" />
		      <Wait wait_duration="5"/>
		    </Sequence>
		    <AlwaysSuccess/>
		  </Fallback>
		</RateController>
		-->
		<RateController hz="2.0" name="UpdatePath">
		  <RecoveryNode number_of_retries="1" name="UpdatePathRecovery">
		    <Sequence>
		      <ClearEntireCostmap name="UpdatePathClearGlobalCostmap-context" server_timeout="5000"
					  service_name="global_costmap/clear_entirely_global_costmap"/>
		      <WaitFloat wait_duration_float="0.5"/>
		      <ComputePathToPose goal="{goal}" path="{path_temp}" planner_id="GridBased"/>
		      <CheckPath  path="{path_temp}" path_topic="/path" plan_topic="/plan" path_out="{path}" />
		    </Sequence>
		    <ForceSuccess>
		      <WaitFloat wait_duration_float="0.5"/>
		    </ForceSuccess>
		  </RecoveryNode>
		</RateController>
		
		<!-- follow path -->
		<RecoveryNode number_of_retries="1" name="FollowPathRecovery">
		  <FollowPath path="{path}" controller_id="FollowPath" />
		  <AlwaysSuccess/>
		</RecoveryNode>
	      </PipelineSequence>
	      
	      <!-- recovery -->
	      <SequenceStar name="RecoveryActions">
		<ClearEntireCostmap name="Recovery-ClearGlobalCostmap-context" server_timeout="5000"
                                    service_name="/global_costmap/clear_entirely_global_costmap"/>
		<ClearEntireCostmap name="Recovery-ClearLocalCostmap-Context" server_timeout="5000"
				    service_name="/local_costmap/clear_entirely_local_costmap"/>
		<Wait wait_duration="1.0"/>
	      </SequenceStar>
	    </RecoveryNode>
	  </Sequence>
	</RestoreConfig>
      </RestoreConfig>
    </RestoreConfig>
  </BehaviorTree>
</root>

<root main_tree_to_execute="MainTree">
	<BehaviorTree ID="MainTree">
		<Repeat num_cycles="10">
			<Sequence>
				<Delay delay_msec="1000">
					<PoseDetectionControlAction enable="true" />
				</Delay>
				<TrackAction mode="Track" rate="3" detect_voice="0" turn_base="0" />

				<!-- Spin a bit to get localized in the case the initial pose was just set -->
				<RobotSpin angle="-180" velocity="0.4" />
				<RobotSpin angle="180" velocity="0.4" />

				<RobotFindInitAction game_file="robot_find.json" object_type="shapes" random_order="0" needs_init="{needs_init}" robot_pose="{robot_pose}" />

				<!--
				<ForceSuccess>
					<Sequence>
						<BlackboardCheckInt value_A="{needs_init}" value_B="0" return_on_mismatch="FAILURE">
							<Sequence>
								<TextToSpeechActionClient msg="Do you want to setup the game?" />
								<SpeechToTextActionClient text="{said}" />
								<TextCompareAction text="{said}" ck_for=".*(yes|yeah|okay|ok|sure|yep).*" />
								<SetBlackboard output_key="needs_init" value="1" />
							</Sequence>
  					</BlackboardCheckInt>
					</Sequence>
				</ForceSuccess>
        -->

				<Fallback>
					<BlackboardCheckInt value_A="{needs_init}" value_B="1" return_on_mismatch="FAILURE">
						<Sequence>
							<TrackAction mode="Track" rate="3" detect_voice="0" turn_base="1" />
							<TextToSpeechActionClient msg="Game setup. I will ask you to stand at each of the locations.  Put both hands on your hips when you arrive at each location to continue." />
							<ForceSuccess>
								<Sequence>
									<TextToSpeechActionClient msg="Please send in the middle of the game. After the robot aligns to you, put both hands on your hips." />
									<RetryUntilSuccesful num_attempts="20">
										<Delay delay_msec="2000">
											<HumanPoseDetect expected_pose_left="OnHip" expected_pose_right="OnHip" pose_lr_check="both" detected_person="{detected_person}" pose_left_speech="{pose_left_speech}" pose_right_speech="{pose_right_speech}" />
										</Delay>
									</RetryUntilSuccesful>
									<TrackAction mode="Track" rate="3" detect_voice="0" turn_base="0" />
								</Sequence>
							</ForceSuccess>

							<ForceSuccess>
								<KeepRunningUntilFailure>
									<Sequence>
										<RobotFindNextStepAction item_name="{item_name}" />
										<TextToSpeechActionClient msg="Please stand on " msg2="{item_name}" />
										<RetryUntilSuccesful num_attempts="20">
											<Delay delay_msec="2000">
												<Sequence>
													<HumanPoseDetect expected_pose_left="OnHip" expected_pose_right="OnHip" pose_lr_check="both" detected_person="{detected_person}" pose_left_speech="{pose_left_speech}" pose_right_speech="{pose_right_speech}" />
													<ObjectLocationStatusAction x="{x}" y="{y}" />
													<RobotFindSetPositionAction x="{x}" y="{y}" />
												</Sequence>
											</Delay>
										</RetryUntilSuccesful>
									</Sequence>
								</KeepRunningUntilFailure>
							</ForceSuccess>
							<TextToSpeechActionClient msg="Finished setting up" />
							<TrackAction mode="Track" rate="3" detect_voice="0" turn_base="0" />
						</Sequence>
					</BlackboardCheckInt>

					<Sequence>
						<Nav2Client goal="{robot_pose}" />
						<TextToSpeechActionClient msg="Let's play the game!" />

						<TrackAction mode="Track" rate="3" detect_voice="0" turn_base="0" />
						<ForceSuccess>
							<KeepRunningUntilFailure>
								<Sequence>
									<RobotFindNextStepAction item_name="{item_name}" />
									<TextToSpeechActionClient msg="Please stand on " msg2="{item_name}" />
									<RetryUntilSuccesful num_attempts="200">
										<Delay delay_msec="1000">
											<Sequence>
												<ObjectLocationStatusAction x="{x}" y="{y}" />
												<RobotFindCheckStepAction x="{x}" y="{y}" />
												<TextToSpeechActionClient msg="Good job" />
											</Sequence>
										</Delay>
									</RetryUntilSuccesful>
								</Sequence>
							</KeepRunningUntilFailure>
						</ForceSuccess>
						<TextToSpeechActionClient msg="Finished playing the game" />
						<TrackAction mode="Track" rate="3" detect_voice="0" turn_base="0" />
					</Sequence>
				</Fallback>
			</Sequence>
		</Repeat>
	</BehaviorTree>
</root>

                        <NavigateToWp   name="navigate_to_wp" goal="wp_3"/>
                        <NavigateToWp   name="navigate_to_wp" goal="wp_4"/>

<?xml version="1.0"?>
<root main_tree_to_execute="BehaviorTree">
    <!-- ////////// -->
    <BehaviorTree ID="BehaviorTree">
        <SequenceStar>
            <Action ID="Speak" action_name="/gcloud_tts" language="pt_PT" utterance="Tenho fome" voice="pt-PT-Wavenet-D"/>
            <Action ID="WaitForXSeconds" name="Wait2Seconds" result="SUCCESS" seconds="2"/>
            <Fallback>
                <SequenceStar>
                    <RetryUntilSuccesful num_attempts="3">
                        <Action ID="MoveBase" action_name="move_base" frame_id="map" goal_pose="-1.7971;-5.5118;0.0;0;0;-0.72703;0.68659" name="Go to first point"/>
                    </RetryUntilSuccesful>
                    <Parallel failure_threshold="1" success_threshold="2">
                        <SequenceStar>
                            <SetBlackboard output_key="charged" value="0"/>
                            <Action ID="Charge" action="CHARGE" action_name="charging_action"/>
                            <SetBlackboard output_key="charged" value="1"/>
                        </SequenceStar>
                        <SequenceStar>
                            <Action ID="WaitForXSeconds" result="SUCCESS" seconds="45"/>
                            <ReactiveFallback>
                                <Condition A="{charged}" B="1" Condition="==" ID="CompareInt"/>
                                <RetryUntilSuccesful num_attempts="100">
                                    <ForceFailure>
                                        <Sequence>
                                            <Action ID="Speak" action_name="/gcloud_tts" language="pt_PT" utterance="bip bip" voice="pt-PT-Wavenet-D"/>
                                            <Action ID="WaitForXSeconds" result="SUCCESS" seconds="2"/>
                                        </Sequence>
                                    </ForceFailure>
                                </RetryUntilSuccesful>
                            </ReactiveFallback>
                        </SequenceStar>
                    </Parallel>
                </SequenceStar>
            </Fallback>
        </SequenceStar>
    </BehaviorTree>
    <!-- ////////// -->
    <TreeNodesModel>
        <Action ID="Charge">
            <input_port name="action" type="std::string"/>
            <input_port name="action_name" type="std::string"/>
        </Action>
        <Condition ID="CompareInt">
            <input_port name="A" type="int"/>
            <input_port name="B" type="int"/>
            <input_port name="Condition" type="std::string"/>
        </Condition>
        <Action ID="MoveBase">
            <input_port name="action_name" type="std::string"/>
            <input_port name="frame_id" type="std::string"/>
            <input_port name="goal_pose" type="geometry_msgs::PoseStamped_<std::allocator<void> >"/>
        </Action>
        <Action ID="Speak">
            <input_port name="action_name" type="std::string"/>
            <input_port name="language" type="std::string"/>
            <input_port name="utterance" type="std::string"/>
            <input_port name="voice" type="std::string"/>
        </Action>
        <Action ID="WaitForXSeconds">
            <input_port name="result" type="std::string"/>
            <input_port name="seconds" type="std::string"/>
        </Action>
    </TreeNodesModel>
    <!-- ////////// -->
</root>

        </Action>
    </TreeNodesModel>
    <!-- ////////// -->
</root>

                            <Action ID="DropAction" bt_action_type="{bt_action_type}" current_action="{current_action}" ltl_state_current="{ltl_state_current}"/>

        <Condition ID="ReactiveLTLStateCheck">

<!--
  This Behavior Tree replans the global path periodically at 1 Hz and it also has
  recovery actions.
-->
<root main_tree_to_execute="MainTree">
  <BehaviorTree ID="MainTree">
    <RecoveryNode number_of_retries="2" name="NavigateRecovery">
      <PipelineSequence name="NavigateWithReplanning">
        <RateController hz="1.0">
          <RecoveryNode number_of_retries="4" name="ComputePathToPose">
            <ComputePathToPose goal="{goal}" path="{path}" planner_id="GridBased"/>
            <ReactiveFallback name="PathToPoseFallback">
              <GoalUpdated/>
              <RoundRobin name="GlobalPlannerRecoveryActions">
                <ClearEntireCostmap name="ClearGlobalCostmap-Context" service_name="global_costmap/clear_entirely_global_costmap"/>
                <Wait wait_duration="2"/>
              </RoundRobin>
            </ReactiveFallback>
          </RecoveryNode>
        </RateController>
        <RecoveryNode number_of_retries="4" name="FollowPath">
          <FollowPath path="{path}" controller_id="FollowPath"/>
          <ReactiveFallback name="FollowPathFallback">
            <GoalUpdated/>
            <RoundRobin name="PlannerRecoveryActions">
              <ClearEntireCostmap name="ClearLocalCostmap-Context" service_name="local_costmap/clear_entirely_local_costmap"/>
              <Spin spin_dist="1.57"/>
            </RoundRobin>
          </ReactiveFallback>
        </RecoveryNode>
      </PipelineSequence>
      <ReactiveFallback name="RecoveryFallback">
        <GoalUpdated/>
        <Wait wait_duration="5"/>
      </ReactiveFallback>
    </RecoveryNode>
  </BehaviorTree>
</root>

<!--
  This Behavior Tree replans the global path after every 1m.
-->

<root main_tree_to_execute="MainTree">
  <BehaviorTree ID="MainTree">
    <PipelineSequence name="NavigateWithReplanning">
      <DistanceController distance="1.0">
        <ComputePathToPose goal="{goal}" path="{path}" planner_id="GridBased"/>
      </DistanceController>
      <FollowPath path="{path}"  controller_id="FollowPath"/>
    </PipelineSequence>
  </BehaviorTree>
</root>

<?xml version="1.0"?>
<root main_tree_to_execute="BehaviorTree">
    <!-- ////////// -->
    <BehaviorTree ID="BehaviorTree">
        <Parallel failure_threshold="1" success_threshold="1">
            <Repeat num_cycles="-1">
                <Action ID="VariantAction" value="{variant}"/>
            </Repeat>
            <Switch3 case_1="pick" case_2="deliver" case_3="dock" variable="{variant}">
                <SubTreePlus ID="PickDeliverCharge"/>
                <SubTreePlus ID="DeliverCharge"/>
                <SubTreePlus ID="Charge"/>
                <SubTreePlus ID="PickDeliverCharge"/>
            </Switch3>
        </Parallel>
    </BehaviorTree>
    <!-- ////////// -->
    <BehaviorTree ID="Charge">
        <Sequence name="Charge">
            <SubTreePlus ID="GoTo" __shared_blackboard="false" x_input="-9.33" y_input="2.17"/>
        </Sequence>
    </BehaviorTree>
    <!-- ////////// -->
    <BehaviorTree ID="Deliver">
        <Sequence name="deliver">
            <SubTreePlus ID="GoTo" __shared_blackboard="false" x_input="-8.08" y_input="4.11"/>
            <Action ID="objectdrop" obj_index="-1"/>
        </Sequence>
    </BehaviorTree>
    <!-- ////////// -->
    <BehaviorTree ID="DeliverCharge">
        <Sequence name="Deliver/Charge">
            <SubTreePlus ID="Deliver"/>
            <SubTreePlus ID="GoTo" __shared_blackboard="false" x_input="-9.33" y_input="8"/>
        </Sequence>
    </BehaviorTree>
    <!-- ////////// -->
    <BehaviorTree ID="GoTo">
        <Sequence name="GoTo">
            <Action ID="pathPlanner" number_of_waypoints="{number_of_waypoints_}" waypoints="{waypoints_}" x="{x_input}" y="{y_input}"/>
            <Condition ID="CheckPositiveCondition" value="{number_of_waypoints_}"/>
            <Repeat num_cycles="{number_of_waypoints_}">
                <Sequence>
                    <Action ID="ExecutePathAction" w_x="{_w_x}" w_y="{_w_y}" waypoints="{waypoints_}"/>
                    <Action ID="moveRoboterPosition" approachRadius="150" x="{_w_x}" y="{_w_y}"/>
                </Sequence>
            </Repeat>
        </Sequence>
    </BehaviorTree>
    <!-- ////////// -->
    <BehaviorTree ID="PickDeliverCharge">
        <Sequence name="Pick/Deliver/Charge">
            <SubTreePlus ID="pick_subtree"/>
            <SubTreePlus ID="Deliver"/>
            <SubTreePlus ID="GoTo" __shared_blackboard="false" x_input="-9.33" y_input="2.17"/>
        </Sequence>
    </BehaviorTree>
    <!-- ////////// -->
    <BehaviorTree ID="pick_subtree">
        <Sequence>
            <Action ID="objectplacement" query="WOODENBOX_0.1_0.3_0.3_0.3"/>
            <Repeat num_cycles="4">
                <ForceSuccess>
                    <Sequence name="pick">
                        <Action ID="TxtToWaypointsAction" goal_path="boxes" x="{x}" y="{y}"/>
                        <SubTreePlus ID="GoTo" __shared_blackboard="false" x_input="{x}" y_input="{y}"/>
                        <Action ID="objectplacement" query="MOCK_0.5_0.3_0.3_0.3"/>
                    </Sequence>
                </ForceSuccess>
            </Repeat>
        </Sequence>
    </BehaviorTree>
    <!-- ////////// -->
    <TreeNodesModel>
        <SubTreePlus ID="Charge"/>
        <Condition ID="CheckPositiveCondition">
            <input_port default="{number_of_waypoints}" name="value"/>
        </Condition>
        <SubTreePlus ID="Deliver"/>
        <SubTreePlus ID="DeliverCharge"/>
        <Action ID="ExecutePathAction">
            <output_port default="{_w_x}" name="w_x"/>
            <output_port default="{_w_y}" name="w_y"/>
            <input_port default="{waypoints_}" name="waypoints"/>
        </Action>
        <SubTreePlus ID="GoTo">
            <input_port default="false" name="__shared_blackboard">If false (default), the Subtree has an isolated blackboard and needs port remapping</input_port>
            <input_port default="1.61" name="x_input"/>
            <input_port default="7.76" name="y_input"/>
        </SubTreePlus>
        <SubTreePlus ID="PickDeliverCharge"/>
        <Action ID="TxtToWaypointsAction">
            <input_port default="boxes" name="goal_path"/>
            <output_port default="{x}" name="x"/>
            <output_port default="{y}" name="y"/>
        </Action>
        <Action ID="VariantAction">
            <output_port default="{variant}" name="value"/>
        </Action>
        <Action ID="activateLocalization"/>
        <Action ID="approachLocation">
            <input_port default="1" name="locationId"/>
        </Action>
        <Action ID="approachWall"/>
        <Action ID="deactivateLocalization"/>
        <Action ID="getBaseCharging">
            <output_port default="{charging}" name="charging"/>
        </Action>
        <Action ID="getPersonPose">
            <input_port default="MARIA" name="personname"/>
            <output_port default="{x_}" name="x"/>
            <output_port default="{y_}" name="y"/>
            <output_port default="{z_}" name="z"/>
        </Action>
        <Action ID="initNavigation"/>
        <Action ID="loadMap"/>
        <Action ID="loadNavigationMap">
            <input_port default="navigation-map" name="mapname"/>
        </Action>
        <Action ID="moveRoboterBackwardsLocation"/>
        <Action ID="moveRoboterBackwardsRelative"/>
        <Action ID="moveRoboterOrientateRobotAbs"/>
        <Action ID="moveRoboterOrientateRobotRel"/>
        <Action ID="moveRoboterPosition">
            <input_port default="50" name="approachRadius"/>
            <input_port default="0" name="x"/>
            <input_port default="0" name="y"/>
        </Action>
        <Action ID="objectdrop">
            <input_port name="obj_index"/>
        </Action>
        <Action ID="objectplacement">
            <input_port name="query"/>
        </Action>
        <Action ID="pathPlanner">
            <output_port default="{number_of_waypoints_}" name="number_of_waypoints"/>
            <output_port default="{waypoints_}" name="waypoints"/>
            <input_port default="0" name="x"/>
            <input_port default="0" name="y"/>
        </Action>
        <Action ID="peoplerecognition"/>
        <SubTreePlus ID="pick_subtree"/>
        <Action ID="setRobotPose">
            <input_port default="0" name="x"/>
            <input_port default="0" name="y"/>
            <input_port default="0" name="yaw"/>
        </Action>
        <Action ID="startJoystickNavigation"/>
        <Action ID="startReactiveNavigation"/>
        <Action ID="stopJoystickNavigation"/>
        <Action ID="stopReactiveNavigation"/>
        <Action ID="triggerGlobalLocalization"/>
    </TreeNodesModel>
    <!-- ////////// -->
</root>

<root main_tree_to_execute="MainTree">
    <!--  ===================================  -->
    <BehaviorTree ID="AlarmTree">
        <SequenceStar>
            <Condition ID="Alarm"/>
            <Condition ID="IsCivilian"/>
            <Action ID="AbortJob"/>
            <Fallback>
                <SequenceStar>
                    <Condition ID="IsInSafeRoom"/>
                    <Action ID="RandomMove"/>
                </SequenceStar>
                <SequenceStar>
                    <Action ID="GetSafeRoomPosition"/>
                    <Action ID="Move"/>
                </SequenceStar>
            </Fallback>
        </SequenceStar>
    </BehaviorTree>
    <!--  ===================================  -->
    <BehaviorTree ID="Combat">
        <SequenceStar>
            <Fallback>
                <Condition ID="IsInCombat"/>
                <Condition ID="HasHuntTarget"/>
            </Fallback>
            <Action ID="AbortJob"/>
            <ForceSuccess>
                <SequenceStar>
                    <Action ID="GetTarget"/>
                    <Action ID="Move"/>
                    <Sequence>
                        <Condition ID="TargetAdjacent"/>
                        <Action ID="AttackTarget"/>
                    </Sequence>
                </SequenceStar>
            </ForceSuccess>
            <Condition ID="IsInCombat"/>
        </SequenceStar>
    </BehaviorTree>
    <!--  ===================================  -->
    <BehaviorTree ID="GetUniform">
        <SequenceStar name="GetUniform">
            <Action ID="CheckUniform"/>
            <Fallback>
                <Action ID="Move"/>
                <Action ID="UniformCleanUp"/>
            </Fallback>
            <Action ID="EquipUniform"/>
        </SequenceStar>
    </BehaviorTree>
    <!--  ===================================  -->
    <BehaviorTree ID="Hunger">
        <SequenceStar>
            <Condition ID="IsHungry"/>
            <Sequence>
                <SequenceStar name="Hunger">
                    <Action ID="FindFood"/>
                    <Action ID="Move"/>
                    <Action ID="PickUpItem"/>
                    <ForceSuccess>
                        <SequenceStar>
                            <Action ID="FindDining"/>
                            <Action ID="Move"/>
                        </SequenceStar>
                    </ForceSuccess>
                    <Action ID="Eat"/>
                </SequenceStar>
                <Condition ID="IsFull"/>
            </Sequence>
        </SequenceStar>
    </BehaviorTree>
    <!--  ===================================  -->
    <BehaviorTree ID="JobButcherAnimal">
        <BB_Precondition expected="ButcherAnimal" key="JobType">
            <Fallback>
                <SequenceStar>
                    <Action ID="InitAnimalJob"/>
                    <Action ID="Move"/>
                    <Action ID="GrabAnimal"/>
                    <Action ID="GetItemDropPosition"/>
                    <Action ID="Move"/>
                    <Action ID="FinalMoveAnimal"/>
                    <Action ID="ButcherAnimal"/>
                    <Action ID="FinishJob"/>
                </SequenceStar>
                <Action ID="AbortJob"/>
            </Fallback>
        </BB_Precondition>
    </BehaviorTree>
    <!--  ===================================  -->
    <BehaviorTree ID="JobDyeAnimal">
        <BB_Precondition expected="DyeAnimal" key="JobType">
            <Fallback>
                <SequenceStar>
                    <Action ID="InitJob"/>
                    <Action ID="ClaimItems"/>
                    <SubTree ID="MoveAllItemsToJob"/>
                    <Action ID="InitAnimalJob"/>
                    <Action ID="Move"/>
                    <Action ID="GrabAnimal"/>
                    <Action ID="GetItemDropPosition"/>
                    <Action ID="Move"/>
                    <Action ID="FinalMoveAnimal"/>
                    <Action ID="DyeAnimal"/>
                    <Action ID="FinishJob"/>
                </SequenceStar>
                <Action ID="AbortJob"/>
            </Fallback>
        </BB_Precondition>
    </BehaviorTree>
    <!--  ===================================  -->
    <BehaviorTree ID="JobHarvestAnimal">
        <BB_Precondition expected="HarvestAnimal" key="JobType">
            <Fallback>
                <SequenceStar>
                    <Action ID="InitAnimalJob"/>
                    <Action ID="Move"/>
                    <Action ID="GrabAnimal"/>
                    <Action ID="HarvestAnimal"/>
                    <Action ID="ReleaseAnimal"/>
                    <Action ID="FinishJob"/>
                </SequenceStar>
                <Action ID="AbortJob"/>
            </Fallback>
        </BB_Precondition>
    </BehaviorTree>
    <!--  ===================================  -->
    <BehaviorTree ID="JobHaulMultiple">
        <BB_Precondition expected="HauleMultipleItems" key="JobType">
            <Fallback>
                <SequenceStar>
                    <Action ID="InitJob"/>
                    <Action ID="FindTool"/>
                    <Action ID="Move"/>
                    <Action ID="EquipTool"/>
                    <Inverter>
                        <Sequence>
                            <Inverter>
                                <Condition ID="AllPickedUp"/>
                            </Inverter>
                            <Sequence>
                                <Action ID="Move"/>
                                <Action ID="PickUpItem"/>
                            </Sequence>
                            <Action ID="ReturnAlwaysRunning"/>
                        </Sequence>
                    </Inverter>
                    <Condition ID="AllPickedUp"/>
                    <Action ID="GetItemDropPosition"/>
                    <Action ID="Move"/>
                    <Action ID="DropAllItems"/>
                    <Action ID="FinishJob"/>
                </SequenceStar>
                <Action ID="AbortJob"/>
            </Fallback>
        </BB_Precondition>
    </BehaviorTree>
    <!--  ===================================  -->
    <BehaviorTree ID="JobLeadAnimalToPasture">
        <BB_Precondition expected="LeadAnimalToPasture" key="JobType">
            <Fallback>
                <SequenceStar>
                    <Action ID="InitAnimalJob"/>
                    <Action ID="Move"/>
                    <Action ID="GrabAnimal"/>
                    <Action ID="GetItemDropPosition"/>
                    <Action ID="Move"/>
                    <Action ID="FinalMoveAnimal"/>
                    <Action ID="ReleaseAnimal"/>
                    <Action ID="FinishJob"/>
                </SequenceStar>
                <Action ID="AbortJob"/>
            </Fallback>
        </BB_Precondition>
    </BehaviorTree>
    <!--  ===================================  -->
    <BehaviorTree ID="JobStandard">
        <Fallback>
            <SequenceStar name="StandardJobs">
                <Action ID="InitJob"/>
                <Action ID="ClaimItems"/>
                <Action ID="FindTool"/>
                <Action ID="Move"/>
                <Action ID="EquipTool"/>
                <SubTree ID="MoveAllItemsToJob"/>
                <Action ID="GetWorkPosition"/>
                <Action ID="Move"/>
                <Action ID="Work"/>
                <Action ID="FinishJob"/>
            </SequenceStar>
            <Action ID="AbortJob"/>
        </Fallback>
    </BehaviorTree>
    <!--  ===================================  -->
    <BehaviorTree ID="JobTameAnimal">
        <BB_Precondition expected="TameAnimal" key="JobType">
            <Fallback>
                <SequenceStar>
                    <Action ID="InitAnimalJob"/>
                    <Action ID="Move"/>
                    <Action ID="TameAnimal"/>
                    <Action ID="GrabAnimal"/>
                    <Action ID="GetItemDropPosition"/>
                    <Action ID="Move"/>
                    <Action ID="FinalMoveAnimal"/>
                    <Action ID="ReleaseAnimal"/>
                    <Action ID="FinishJob"/>
                </SequenceStar>
                <Action ID="AbortJob"/>
            </Fallback>
        </BB_Precondition>
    </BehaviorTree>
    <!--  ===================================  -->
    <BehaviorTree ID="Jobs">
        <SequenceStar>
            <Action ID="GetJob"/>
            <FallbackStar>
                <SubTree ID="JobButcherAnimal"/>
                <SubTree ID="JobDyeAnimal"/>
                <SubTree ID="JobLeadAnimalToPasture"/>
                <SubTree ID="JobHarvestAnimal"/>
                <SubTree ID="JobTameAnimal"/>
                <SubTree ID="JobHaulMultiple"/>
                <SubTree ID="JobStandard"/>
            </FallbackStar>
        </SequenceStar>
    </BehaviorTree>
    <!--  ===================================  -->
    <BehaviorTree ID="MainTree">
        <Fallback>
            <SubTree ID="AlarmTree"/>
            <SubTree ID="Combat"/>
            <SubTree ID="Mission"/>
            <FallbackStar name="Needs">
                <SubTree ID="Hunger"/>
                <SubTree ID="Thirst"/>
                <SubTree ID="Sleepy"/>
            </FallbackStar>
            <FallbackStar name="GnomeStandard">
                <FallbackStar>
                    <SubTree ID="GetUniform"/>
                    <SubTree ID="PickUpBandages"/>
                    <SubTree ID="Training"/>
                    <SubTree ID="Trainer"/>
                </FallbackStar>
                <SubTree ID="Jobs"/>
                <Action ID="RandomMove"/>
            </FallbackStar>
        </Fallback>
    </BehaviorTree>
    <!--  ===================================  -->
    <BehaviorTree ID="Mission">
        <SequenceStar>
            <Condition ID="IsOnMission"/>
            <Action ID="AbortJob"/>
            <Action ID="GetExitPosition"/>
            <Action ID="Move"/>
            <Action ID="LeaveForMission"/>
            <Action ID="DoMission"/>
            <Action ID="ReturnFromMission"/>
        </SequenceStar>
    </BehaviorTree>
    <!--  ===================================  -->
    <BehaviorTree ID="MoveAllItemsToJob">
        <Sequence>
            <Inverter>
                <Sequence>
                    <Inverter>
                        <Condition ID="AllItemsInPlaceForJob"/>
                    </Inverter>
                    <SequenceStar>
                        <Action ID="Move"/>
                        <Action ID="PickUpItem"/>
                        <Action ID="GetItemDropPosition"/>
                        <Action ID="Move"/>
                        <Action ID="DropItem"/>
                    </SequenceStar>
                    <Action ID="ReturnAlwaysRunning"/>
                </Sequence>
            </Inverter>
            <Condition ID="AllItemsInPlaceForJob"/>
        </Sequence>
    </BehaviorTree>
    <!--  ===================================  -->
    <BehaviorTree ID="OldMoveAllItemsToJob">
        <FallbackStar>
            <Condition ID="AllItemsInPlaceForJob"/>
            <RetryUntilSuccesful num_attempts="20">
                <Sequence>
                    <SequenceStar>
                        <Action ID="Move"/>
                        <Action ID="PickUpItem"/>
                        <Fallback>
                            <Action ID="GetItemDropPosition"/>
                            <Action ID="DropItem"/>
                        </Fallback>
                        <Fallback>
                            <Action ID="Move"/>
                            <Action ID="DropItem"/>
                        </Fallback>
                        <Action ID="DropItem"/>
                    </SequenceStar>
                    <Condition ID="AllItemsInPlaceForJob"/>
                </Sequence>
            </RetryUntilSuccesful>
            <ForceFailure>
                <Action ID="AbortJob"/>
            </ForceFailure>
        </FallbackStar>
    </BehaviorTree>
    <!--  ===================================  -->
    <BehaviorTree ID="PickUpBandages">
        <SequenceStar>
            <Action ID="CheckBandages"/>
            <Action ID="Move"/>
            <Action ID="PickUpItem"/>
        </SequenceStar>
    </BehaviorTree>
    <!--  ===================================  -->
    <BehaviorTree ID="Sleepy">
        <SequenceStar name="Sleep">
            <Condition ID="IsSleepy"/>
            <ForceSuccess>
                <SequenceStar>
                    <Action ID="FindBed"/>
                    <Action ID="Move"/>
                </SequenceStar>
            </ForceSuccess>
            <Action ID="Sleep"/>
        </SequenceStar>
    </BehaviorTree>
    <!--  ===================================  -->
    <BehaviorTree ID="Thirst">
        <SequenceStar>
            <Condition ID="IsThirsty"/>
            <Sequence>
                <SequenceStar name="Thirst">
                    <Action ID="FindDrink"/>
                    <Action ID="Move"/>
                    <Action ID="PickUpItem"/>
                    <ForceSuccess>
                        <SequenceStar>
                            <Action ID="FindDining"/>
                            <Action ID="Move"/>
                        </SequenceStar>
                    </ForceSuccess>
                    <Action ID="Drink"/>
                </SequenceStar>
                <Condition ID="IsDrinkFull"/>
            </Sequence>
        </SequenceStar>
    </BehaviorTree>
    <!--  ===================================  -->
    <BehaviorTree ID="Trainer">
        <SequenceStar name="Trainer">
            <Condition ID="IsTrainer"/>
            <Action ID="FindTrainerPosition"/>
            <Action ID="Move"/>
            <Action ID="SuperviseTraining"/>
        </SequenceStar>
    </BehaviorTree>
    <!--  ===================================  -->
    <BehaviorTree ID="Training">
        <SequenceStar name="Training">
            <Condition ID="IsTrainingTime"/>
            <Action ID="FindTrainingGround"/>
            <Action ID="Move"/>
            <Action ID="Train"/>
        </SequenceStar>
    </BehaviorTree>
    <!--  ===================================  -->
    <TreeNodesModel>
        <Action ID="AbortJob"/>
        <Condition ID="Alarm"/>
        <SubTree ID="AlarmTree"/>
        <Condition ID="AllItemsInPlaceForJob"/>
        <Condition ID="AllPickedUp"/>
        <Action ID="AttackTarget"/>
        <Action ID="ButcherAnimal"/>
        <Action ID="CheckBandages"/>
        <Action ID="CheckUniform"/>
        <Action ID="ClaimItems"/>

        <Action ID="Drink"/>
        <Action ID="DropAllItems"/>
        <Action ID="DropItem"/>
        <Action ID="DyeAnimal"/>
        <Action ID="Eat"/>
        <Action ID="EnterMap"/>
        <Action ID="EquipTool"/>
        <Action ID="EquipUniform"/>
        <Action ID="FinalMoveAnimal"/>
        <Action ID="FindBed"/>
        <Action ID="FindDining"/>
        <Action ID="FindDrink"/>
        <Action ID="FindFood"/>
        <Action ID="FindTool"/>
        <Action ID="FindTrainerPosition"/>
        <Action ID="FindTrainingGround"/>
        <Action ID="FinishJob"/>
        <Action ID="GetExitPosition"/>
        <Action ID="GetItemDropPosition"/>
        <Action ID="GetJob"/>
        <Action ID="GetSafeRoomPosition"/>
        <Action ID="GetTarget"/>

        <Action ID="GetWorkPosition"/>
        <Action ID="GrabAnimal"/>
        <Action ID="HarvestAnimal"/>
        <Condition ID="HasHuntTarget"/>

        <Action ID="InitAnimalJob"/>

<!--
  This Behavior Tree replans the global path periodically at 1 Hz and it also has
  recovery actions such as moving forward and spinning.
-->
<root main_tree_to_execute="MainTree">
  <BehaviorTree ID="MainTree">
    <ReactiveFallback name="BatteryFallback">
      <Sequence name="LowBatteryBehavior">
        <IsBatteryLow min_battery="70" battery_topic="/battery_status" is_voltage="true"/>
        <PipelineSequence name="GoBase">
            <RateController hz="1.0">
              <ComputePathToPose goal="0;0;0" path="{path}" planner_id="GridBased"/>
            </RateController>
            <FollowPath path="{path}" controller_id="FollowPath"/>
          </PipelineSequence>
      </Sequence>
      <RecoveryNode number_of_retries="6" name="NavigateRecovery">
        <PipelineSequence name="NavigateWithReplanning">
          <RateController hz="1.0">
            <RecoveryNode number_of_retries="1" name="ComputePathToPose">
              <ComputePathToPose goal="{goal}" path="{path}" planner_id="GridBased"/>
              <ClearEntireCostmap name="ClearGlobalCostmap-Context" service_name="global_costmap/clear_entirely_global_costmap"/>
            </RecoveryNode>
          </RateController>
          <RecoveryNode number_of_retries="1" name="FollowPath">
            <FollowPath path="{path}" controller_id="FollowPath"/>
            <ClearEntireCostmap name="ClearLocalCostmap-Context" service_name="local_costmap/clear_entirely_local_costmap"/>
          </RecoveryNode>
        </PipelineSequence>
        <ReactiveFallback name="RecoveryFallback">
          <GoalUpdated/>
          <SequenceStar name="RecoveryActions">
            <ClearEntireCostmap name="ClearLocalCostmap-Subtree" service_name="local_costmap/clear_entirely_local_costmap"/>
            <ClearEntireCostmap name="ClearGlobalCostmap-Subtree" service_name="global_costmap/clear_entirely_global_costmap"/>
            <Spin spin_dist="1.57"/>
            <Wait wait_duration="5"/>
          </SequenceStar>
        </ReactiveFallback>
      </RecoveryNode>
    </ReactiveFallback>
    
  </BehaviorTree>
</root>

<!--
  This Behavior Tree replans the global path periodically at 1 Hz.
-->

</root>

<root main_tree_to_execute="BehaviorTree">

    <BehaviorTree ID="BehaviorTree">
        <ReactiveSequence name="Pursue Goals">
            <Fallback name="No Item in gripper">
                <Inverter name="Not">
                    <Condition ID="HoldingItem" name="Holding an Item"/>
                </Inverter>
                <Action ID="Place" name="Place it"/>
            </Fallback>
            <Fallback name="No Item to pick">
                <Inverter name="Not">
                    <Condition ID="SeeItem" name="See an Item"/>
                </Inverter>
                <Action ID="Pick" name="Pick it up"/>
            </Fallback>
            <Action ID="AlwaysRunning" name="Keep Running"/>
        </ReactiveSequence>
    </BehaviorTree>
    <!-- ////////// -->
    <BehaviorTree ID="Init">
        <Action ID="Print" message="Initialize"/>
    </BehaviorTree>
    <!-- ////////// -->
    <TreeNodesModel>
        <Action ID="AlwaysRunning"/>
        <Action ID="GetItemPose"/>
        <Condition ID="HoldingItem"/>
        <SubTree ID="Init"/>
        <Action ID="Pick"/>
        <Action ID="Place"/>
        <Action ID="Print">
            <input_port name="message"/>
        </Action>
        <Condition ID="SeeItem"/>
        <Action ID="Trigger">
            <input_port name="service_name"/>
        </Action>
    </TreeNodesModel>
    <!-- ////////// -->
</root>

                                </Sequence>
                                <Sequence name="">
                                    <Condition ID="checkEndLaneChange"/>
                                    <Action ID="setStateLaneKeeping"/>
                                </Sequence>
                                <Action ID="setStateLaneChangeRight"/>
                            </Fallback>
                        </Sequence>
                        <Sequence name="Astar">

                            <Action ID="setPath"/>
                            <Fallback name="local_check">

                                    <Action ID="genPathAstar"/>

                                <Sequence name="">
                                    <Condition ID="checkFinishAstar"/>
                                    <Action ID="setFinishLocal"/>
                                    <Action ID="setStateLaneKeeping"/>
                                </Sequence>
                                <Action ID="localPathfollow"/>
                            </Fallback>
                        </Sequence>
                        <Sequence name="Recovery">
                            <AlwaysFailure/>
                        </Sequence>
                    </Fallback>
                </Sequence>
                <Sequence name="traffic_check">
                    <Fallback name="">
                        <Fallback name="">
                            <Sequence name="">
                                <Condition ID="checkPassAbleTrafficLight"/>
                                <Fallback name="">
                                    <Sequence name="">
                                        <Condition ID="checkCollision"/>
                                        <Action ID="stop"/>
                                    </Sequence>
                                    <Action ID="drive"/>
                                </Fallback>
                            </Sequence>
                            <Action ID="stopTrafficLight"/>
                        </Fallback>
                        <Action ID="drive"/>
                    </Fallback>
                    <Action ID="setPath"/>
                </Sequence>
                <Action ID="publishData"/>
            </Sequence>
        </Fallback>
    </BehaviorTree>
    <!-- ////////// -->

<root main_tree_to_execute="MainTree">

    <PipelineSequence name="NavigateWithReplanning">
      <RateController hz="1.0">
        <Sequence>
          <GoalUpdater input_goal="{goal}" output_goal="{updated_goal}">
